The Presidential Debates are about to start and I really want YOU to be at one of them with me. You’ve always been one of my top supporters, and I cannot imagine having anyone else there with me for this historic event. For a short time, if you contribute any amount RIGHT NOW, you’ll automatically be entered TWICE to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT before 11:59 PM TONIGHT and you will be automatically entered TWICE to win a trip to the Presidential Debate. >> DOUBLE YOUR CHANCES CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT Remember, if you win: - You’ll get to bring a guest of your choice - We’ll cover your flight - We’ll cover your hotel - And, You’ll get VIP ACCESS PASSES to the debate. Tomorrow morning, my team is giving me the FINAL list of Patriots who have entered to win a trip to a Presidential Debate. I know I’ll see your name at the very top. Trump President of the United States CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here or by texting “DEBATE” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between September 1, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on September 24, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) and receive a photo opportunity with President Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Please only make a donation if you can afford to do so._

Friend-- Today is the first day of early voting. The 2020 election is officially here in Virginia. So much is at stake. Governor Northam and First Lady Pam Northam cast their ballots today in Richmond. He is the first Virginia governor to cast his ballot early and is encouraging all Virginians to cast their ballot and make their voice heard. **[We have an opportunity to keep Virginia blue this November. Stand with us so we can send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to the White House, Mark Warner back to the US Senate and win in Congressional races across the Commonwealth.](https://act.myngp.com/el/JW2DJZgNqle_kI59CsVTu9pfixp5hHwlDP38mykIxkg=/NmNYpGSrDgr9P1SaBKzXl77GGEL8gj6uTiJr5AOvc84=)** For more information on how to cast your ballot, visit **[https://iwillvote.com/](https://act.myngp.com/el/JW2DJZgNqle_kI59CsVTu9pfixp5hHwlDP38mykIxkg=/IxZL8fc7WG2s3YcO3Otl8FU-0Vga7WoC-wikHLvJaOU=)**. Take care and stay safe. **-The Way Ahead Team **

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Mondaire will never stop fighting for a Green New Deal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We must address the climate crisis with the urgency this moment demands.
#

Friends,
The entire West Coast is enveloped in smoke.
Today, in the wealthiest nation in the world, we have hundreds of thousands of climate refugees, displaced in the middle of a pandemic. Many of them don’t even have _towns_ to return to, let alone homes.
**Climate change is real, and we must address the climate crisis with the urgency the times demand. That’s why Mondaire will never stop fighting for a Green New Deal.**
**[If you agree, will you make a contribution to our campaign today so that Mondaire can fight for immediate action on climate change in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19266230/252438455/-1084116692?refcode2=8821db01-bcf9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200918-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODIxZGIwMS1iY2Y5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxeMFar8uCi7sCOWUf4F8ON9HqD7mRPFvFuXSUAYuO0=)**
The Green New Deal is also a vehicle for economic justice: it’s about our government truly investing in our most neglected and marginalized communities.
Communities of color are significantly more likely to breathe hazardous air, live in homes that fail to meet health and safety standards, and lack access to clean drinking water.
And as these past few weeks have shown, we will all be facing the consequences of climate change in the next few years. That’s why we must push for a Green New Deal — to ensure that all Americans have a planet to live on for generations to come, and that we are not turning a blind eye to our most vulnerable communities.
**[Please join us in this fight for a Green New Deal and make a contribution to our campaign today to help elect Mondaire, a leader who understands the urgency of the climate crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19266231/252438456/-1084116692?refcode2=8821db01-bcf9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200918-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODIxZGIwMS1iY2Y5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YxeMFar8uCi7sCOWUf4F8ON9HqD7mRPFvFuXSUAYuO0=)**
Thank you for being a part of this movement!
\- Team Mondaire

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Sen. Cory Booker to speak at Three Star, Meet Marquita Bradshaw, Protect the Vote & Hispanic Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://tndp.org/3star/ [https://tndp.org/3star/]
Dear Peter,

Cory, Cory, Cory! He's a leader in the Black community, a fierce advocate for criminal justice reform, a former presidential candidate, and he will be the keynote speaker for Tennessee Democratic Party's Three Star Celebration.

Our largest annual fundraiser, Three Star is a tradition for Tennessee Democrats and every year we set a theme for each of the three stars on the Tennessee Star Flag. This year, the first star represents the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th amendment (Tennessee was the 36th state to vote yes and has been known since then as "The Perfect 36") The second star represents the 60th anniversary of the Nashville sit-ins and desegregation of downtown lunch counters . The third star celebrates our future and will feature the Democratic candidates and local elected officials who represent the future of our great state.

This year, Three Star will be virtual, with a great lineup of elected Democrats, candidates, and musical performances who will join Senator Booker. All proceeds raised will go directly to supporting candidates in the 2020 election cycle.

You won't want to miss this: PURCHASE YOUR TICKETS OR SPONSOR THREE STAR NOW! [https://tndp.org/3star/]
THANK YOU!
The TNDP Team

MEET YOUR U.S. SENATE CANDIDATE, MARQUITA BRADSHAW!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Marquita%20Bradshaw%20dank%20pic.jpg]
Kansas City or Memphis Barbeque? Colts or Titans? Marquita Bradshaw or Bill Hagerty?

Often in life, choices are difficult. But this one's easy: Memphis Barbeque, Titans football, and Marquita Bradshaw.
Marquita Bradshaw isn't a career politician. She's an outsider. She grew up dealing with the issues she's running on, not commenting upon them from an Ivory Tower.

Her parents raised her in a family-focused neighborhood on the South Side of Memphis. They lived paycheck-to-paycheck, swimming upstream in more ways than one.

She grew up a stone's throw away from a toxic waste dump, putting her family and her community at great risk of life-threatening illness, like the cancer that killed her great grandmother. As her family and neighbors suffered because of their proximity to industrial poisons, they were also strained economically by a broken healthcare system that monetized disease and suffering instead of wellness and prevention, declining wages, waning economic mobility, and a War on Drugs riddled with racism.

Marquita expereinced these injustices and decided to do something. She became a grassroots activist, seeking to give voice to the voiceless across a number of issue areas—organizing for labor and environmental justice.

Marquita is bringing that same energy to her bid for U.S. Senate by campaigning on the most pressing problems Tennesseans face today: a sky-high uninsured rate, a warming planet, and an unfair criminal justice system. As Tennessee's first Black woman Senator (and the nation's third), she'll bring the people's voice to the Senate floor and represent communities that for too long have been denied a seat at the table.

Election day is November 3rd and early voting starts October 14th. Marquita is asking you to join her in this campaign. Whether it's your time, energy, or money, all are essential to make sure she wins. Join her campaign now [https://www.marquitabradshaw.com/] and l et's send Marquita to the Senate.

See you at the polls, [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]

Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Protect the Vote
www.mobilize.us/tennesseecollegedemocrats/event/312353/ [www.mobilize.us/tennesseecollegedemocrats/event/312353/]
This is one of the most important election years! Republicans know it too and we must keep them from suppressing the vote! Fill out one (or more!) of the following forms to join our Voter Protection program.
TNDP HOTLINE SIGNUP [https://secure.ngpvan.com/uz-6HfqMf028C9Jfrw4TZw2]
EARLY VOTING POLL WATCHER SIGNUP [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tZqcMWPBdEO9dFfxk7rYZw2]
ELECTION DAY POLL WATCHER SIGNUP [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2-GkUoBGsk2GEIPver1P4w2]
VOTER RECRUITMENT PHONE BANK SIGNUP [https://www.openvpb.com/vpb_bycode/96AD14O-646317]
HISPANIC HERITAGE MONTH
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/gabby%20salinas.jpg]
During Hispanic Heritage Month we honor the cultural, artistic and economic contributions of Tennessee's Hispanic and LatinX community. Let's get them a seat at the table. There are currently ZERO people representing this vibrant commuity in Tennessee's General Assembly. Gabby Salinas is going to change that—she's in a tight race for state house district 97.
Help get her across the finish line: donate today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gabby-for-tn-house] .
MAKE A PLAN TO
VOTE EARLY DURING EARLY VOTING
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Early%20Voting%20Donkey600w.png]
Early voting is easy, safe and quick and the best solution to avoid crowded polling locations and Covid-19 risks. Make your plan to wear a mask, go during non-peak hours if possible, and maintain social distancing.
Early voting times and locations differ in each county. Check your county election commission for all times and locations at IWILLVOTE.COM [http://IWILLVOTE.COM] .
https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2?emci=9df1d308-26f9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid= [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2?emci=9df1d308-26f9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]
PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

| | Friend, Did you hear the news? **Trump is back in Minnesota again today, this time he is visiting a legislative district we won in 2018 by only 11 votes.** Trump knows that control of the Legislature and victory in Minnesota hinges on districts like the one Bemidji is in. Let's face it, we don't know what he will say today. But this visit will mean more money and a harder push to flip Minnesota -- and Bemidji -- this November. We need your help: will you invest in our Trump Rapid Response program so we can respond to whatever comes our way? _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Donate $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gRQDnmDnD_Tv8V61o8HwqmRrdSKC0e4LQULVK23-etI=/juaIZ77A52BtVPNIGOJTQ2q_LGLzzlUgcL0t4Fb-TjU=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=091820) [**Donate $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gRQDnmDnD_Tv8V61o8HwqmRrdSKC0e4LQULVK23-etI=/juaIZ77A52BtVPNIGOJTQ2q_LGLzzlUgcL0t4Fb-TjU=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=091820) [**Donate $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gRQDnmDnD_Tv8V61o8HwqmRrdSKC0e4LQULVK23-etI=/juaIZ77A52BtVPNIGOJTQ2q_LGLzzlUgcL0t4Fb-TjU=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=091820) [**Donate $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gRQDnmDnD_Tv8V61o8HwqmRrdSKC0e4LQULVK23-etI=/juaIZ77A52BtVPNIGOJTQ2q_LGLzzlUgcL0t4Fb-TjU=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=091820) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gRQDnmDnD_Tv8V61o8HwqmRrdSKC0e4LQULVK23-etI=/juaIZ77A52BtVPNIGOJTQ2q_LGLzzlUgcL0t4Fb-TjU=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=091820) We need to be ready for anything he may throw at us.**Together, we can keep Minnesota blue this November, grow Rep. | Dear Friend,

With just a few more weeks to go until Election Day, there is still much work to be done to make room for change in D.C. I am honored to have earned the endorsement of Make Room, a grassroots movement pushing for the next generation of fearless progressive leaders in this country.

| Make Room is working to build a coalition of progressive voices and candidates that will fight for true reform in our country, and embolden support for compassionate, data-driven policies that reduce inequity and strengthen our communities.

I am pleased Make Room has recognized the importance of our campaign for Dignity and Justice for All.

Because this is a people-powered campaign, we still need your help to win IN-02. Friend, will you invest in change?

name: Josh Hicks
subject: The people of Kentucky can’t afford Andy Barr’s lies any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Just like we all knew would happen, my opponent is up with negative ads, lying about my positions.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19272694/252468288/1122591835?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200918newTVad_JH_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDMxNjNkMy1jZGY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=az-jBORujWXfdp1eoogWdiAUGbnmNiCBAUkmoeRM06U=)
| | Hey everybody, it's Josh. I’m writing to you today because, just like we all knew would happen, my opponent is up with negative ads, lying about my positions. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19272695/252468289/1122591835?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200918newTVad_JH_all_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDMxNjNkMy1jZGY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=az-jBORujWXfdp1eoogWdiAUGbnmNiCBAUkmoeRM06U=)
---
Here’s the thing — I’ll be fine. I can take a hit.
**But it’s not about me. The people of Kentucky can’t afford Andy Barr’s lies any longer.**
Andy Barr is saying he’ll always protect people with pre-existing conditions.
I can’t let a lie as dangerous as that stand.
He voted over and over to do away with protections for people with pre-existing conditions — people like my mom. Hundreds of thousands of Kentuckians, some with life-threatening conditions, would lose their coverage if Andy’s plans succeed.
He lied about the votes he’s taken in Congress, lied about the way he’s failed to protect people’s healthcare, and lied about what he intends to do if he has the privilege of voting on another healthcare bill.
We’re going to fight back against his lies. And you’re going to help us do it.
**Today, we’re launching a new television ad to set the record straight — and I’m asking you personally:**
[_**Can you chip in to fund this television ad so we can fight back against my opponent’s lies? Click here to watch the ad, and then donate whatever you can.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19272696/252468290/1122591835?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200918newTVad_JH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDMxNjNkMy1jZGY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=az-jBORujWXfdp1eoogWdiAUGbnmNiCBAUkmoeRM06U=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | [**DONATE $10 ➞**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19272703/252468297/1122591835?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200918newTVad_JH_all_ld_abx10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDMxNjNkMy1jZGY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=az-jBORujWXfdp1eoogWdiAUGbnmNiCBAUkmoeRM06U=)

I’m writing to you today because, just like we all knew would happen, my opponent is up with negative ads, lying about my positions. | = Here’s the thing — I’ll be fine. I can take a hit. But it’s not about me. The people of Kentucky can’t afford Andy Barr’s lies any longer. Andy Barr is saying he’ll always protect people with pre-existing conditions. I can’t let a lie as dangerous as that stand. He voted over and over to do away with protections for people with pre-existing conditions — people like my mom. Hundreds of thousands of Kentuckians, some with life-threatening conditions, would lose their coverage if Andy’s plans succeed. He lied about the votes he’s taken in Congress, lied about the way he’s failed to protect people’s healthcare, and lied about what he intends to do if he has the privilege of voting on another healthcare bill. We’re going to fight back against his lies. And you’re going to help us do it. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Barrett?=
subject: We need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
Flipping a district is not an easy task, but with less than 50 days until November 3rd, we know that we have a path to victory. |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=ed8b06097b&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Team – Flipping a district is not an easy task, but with less than 50 days until November 3rd, we know that we have a path to victory.
But simply put, elections are not cheap. We rely on people like you in our grassroots base to help us keep pushing this campaign forward. Due to the pandemic we have become a virtual campaign which means that we don’t have the ability to meet with people face-to-face or hold in-person town halls.
**Unlike Loudermilk, we care about the safety of our district and would never do anything to put others' safety in harm’s way. **
[**Can you help us fill our fundraising gap by donating $10, $25, or $50 right now to ensure that we have everything we need coming up on election day? **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=305800e39c&e=e25784ff28) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [$10 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=6ffe83680c&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$25 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=53941774e8&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$50 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=2be3e63e8e&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$100 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=63c584aaaa&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [$250 →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=5a6404a539&e=e25784ff28)
---
| [Other →](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=33282caeb1&e=e25784ff28)
---

**We need to make sure that we have the resources to keep digital and TV ads running, and to keep yard signs in circulation across the district. Our goal is to make sure that when Georgians get their ballots they know Dana is the right person for the job.**

Ballots are starting to go out and we need to make sure that from now until election day, we’re pushing as hard as possible to flip this district. Coming up short just isn’t an option, and we don't have that many chances left to reach people before votes are cast.

[**Team , help us make sure that our digital ads don’t stop running because we ran out of money. Contribute to our grassroots fund now****! → **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=c7606bebca&e=e25784ff28)
**[GRASSROOTS FUND](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=c9b8cf30e3&e=e25784ff28)**
---

We can’t do this without you!
– Team Barrett

clean_body: Flipping a district is not an easy task, but with less than 50 days until November 3rd, we know that we have a path to victory. | | | | | Team – Flipping a district is not an easy task, but with less than 50 days until November 3rd, we know that we have a path to victory. But simply put, elections are not cheap. We rely on people like you in our grassroots base to help us keep pushing this campaign forward. Due to the pandemic we have become a virtual campaign which means that we don’t have the ability to meet with people face-to-face or hold in-person town halls. Unlike Loudermilk, we care about the safety of our district and would never do anything to put others' safety in harm’s way. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | We need to make sure that we have the resources to keep digital and TV ads running, and to keep yard signs in circulation across the district. Our goal is to make sure that when Georgians get their ballots they know Dana is the right person for the job. Ballots are starting to go out and we need to make sure that from now until election day, we’re pushing as hard as possible to flip this district. Coming up short just isn’t an option, and we don't have that many chances left to reach people before votes are cast. We can’t do this without you! – Team Barrett | | | "Learn More About Our Campaign" | "Contribute to the Campaign Today" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Dana Barrett for Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: I'll protect life, McMurray won't
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Democrats continue their calls to erode our rights, especially the right of every American to life. On November 3rd, you have a major choice, one that will impact the safety of the unborn for decades and the protection of our constitution. So let me lay it out for you - My opponent, Nate McMurray, stands for the expansion of abortion, wants abortion on demand, and supports the radical anti-life policies of Andrew Cuomo, Kamala Harris, and Joe Biden. He probably would have joined the disturbing crowd that gave Cuomo a standing ovation when he signed disgusting abortion expansion legislation. I don't know about you, but I was taught to respect all life - and that the life of every single American is worth protecting. So why are Nate and his liberal friends okay with unchecked abortion? I, on the other hand, have a pro-life record of defending life. I voted against abortion expansion in the State Senate, I have co-sponsored the Born Alive amendment to protect children, the National right to life association has endorsed me, and just today, it was announced that I have been given an A rating by the Susan B. Anthony List for my defense of the right to life. So the choice is clear. Nancy, Nate, and Biden stand with the radical progressives who have let violent criminals run amuck in our streets, and now they want to make the unborn less safe. They only stand for their agenda, not the safety of Americans. Join me. Help me send each of them a strong message that true American patriots, respect life, respect law enforcement, and respect the constitution. Let's make their dreams of a socialist nation just that, dreams. Together we'll send them and their radical ideas packing. [Can I count of you to join my team of dedicated patriots?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/cYfnfVNHOMycJVvrcd6Dvg/J7ehzPSrn3MI892DsGWmapdg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/cYfnfVNHOMycJVvrcd6Dvg/J7ehzPSrn3MI892DsGWmapdg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/cYfnfVNHOMycJVvrcd6Dvg/J7ehzPSrn3MI892DsGWmapdg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/cYfnfVNHOMycJVvrcd6Dvg/J7ehzPSrn3MI892DsGWmapdg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/cYfnfVNHOMycJVvrcd6Dvg/J7ehzPSrn3MI892DsGWmapdg) 2020 is a clear choice, and the other side has made it clear they don't respect America, our constitution, or our values. So let's make sure they can't destroy them by being elected. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

[I have the unique opportunity to unseat a vulnerable GOP Congressman AND score an Electoral College victory for Democrats.](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e85d/77d4c309/21b1d095/2635f92a/2238206553/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200918_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

When I challenged Don Bacon in 2018, I lost by a devastatingly slim margin.

This time I'm leading him by one point -- and the stakes have never been higher.

To survive a recount and defeat both Bacon AND Trump, we can't take a single vote for granted.

**[I have to mobilize voters NOW by running ads and funding our volunteer program. But I need to raise $7,200 to cover the costs. Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e85d/77d4c309/21b1d095/2635f9d2/2238206553/VEsHDQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e85d/77d4c309/21b1d095/2635f9dd/2238206553/VEsHDA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e85d/77d4c309/21b1d095/2635f9dc/2238206553/VEsEBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/079d5b40fbd1/sneak-peek-at-our-very-first-tv-ad-3911690?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| **I wanted to make sure that you saw this email I sent earlier this week about our first TV ad. We have just $8,000 left to reach our goal![Can I count on you to chip in to get us - and keep us - on the air?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a2b8d2e2f1&e=140a9b81e7)**
---
| |
#
It’s official: our very first TV ad is done. Thanks to donors like you, we were able to produce not just an ad, but a great one. I am so incredibly proud of this ad — this is me, and it’s the root of why I’m running for Congress. We’ve had such a tremendous outpouring of support from the people of IL-16 and donors all across the county, and I am ready to take this district back for them. As a token of our appreciation, I am giving you the first look at it:
---
| [Click here to view our first TV ad](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2ab63a71b1&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to view our first TV ad")
---
| However, we need a little help. Now that the ad is made, we have to get it on the air and KEEP it on the air. My team told me that we need to raise an additional $20,000 by the end of the week to make this happen. My opponent is already flooding the airwaves, so it is important that we get our ad out there ASAP. And, now that you have seen what a wonderful job the production team did, I am sure that you agree with me that we shouldn’t let their work go to waste. **Every donation we receive will help us get our message out to voters across all five media markets in this big district.** [Can I count on you to chip in and get our brand new ad on TV?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a2e4b01955&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Greg Stanton
subject: We Must Take Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
It has been more than six months since President Trump stated that the Coronavirus would simply "disappear," but COVID hasn't gone away. In many parts of the country, the rates of infection have increased. Meanwhile, the effect on our economy has been catastrophic. Thousands of Arizonans are unemployed and are struggling to pay their rent and provide for their families. **[That's why my colleagues and I are calling on President Trump and Mitch McConnell to do the right thing and sign COVID relief legislation we passed in the House](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvVGXGxdPtLG9QQvdKwTWUOGXO-45LYoNde4kut0bAE=/RFRknzTBrFU4hAw9tIwnjHVLf_G1A7Plc8aYjyRFZtI=).**

****

Public health and economic stability is not a partisan issue, but political gamesmanship by Mitch McConnell in the Senate has ultimately stalled Federal assistance. We can't afford to waste any more time--we have to take bold, informed action immediately to put our country back on track and that starts with putting leaders in place who believe in science and listen to experts. [**Will you chip in to make sure I have the resources neccessary to get my message out to voters in my district?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvVGXGxdPtLG9QQvdKwTWUOGXO-45LYoNde4kut0bAE=/M_gLQ5EzpBCnvFYLl0OBCIa1-JIG_o4bT-jY3npWS6M=?refcode=X_091420_COVIDUI_A)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvVGXGxdPtLG9QQvdKwTWUOGXO-45LYoNde4kut0bAE=/M_gLQ5EzpBCnvFYLl0OBCIa1-JIG_o4bT-jY3npWS6M=?refcode=X_091420_COVIDUI_A)

Thank you for your support,
\-- _Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

name: Megan West
subject: A Conversation with Jim Caviezel, ‘Passion of the Christ’ Actor
body:
| | Name, Raw. Provocative. Honest. Moving. [Our conversation with Jim Caviezel](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNHLBFFOfhbeBmkpWhJc2HdPJTDmijG-0lCm5sgKQ3vugZ-Mqq9VThiXFEz1oUST7nauar1aRvCBeF3ZgS5JIsm&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=1) is one of the most fascinating interviews we have ever done. You may remember Jim for his iconic portrayal of Jesus in _The Passion of the Christ_ or for his popular lead role in the CBS drama, _Person of Interest_. Today, September 18, his new movie, [Infidel](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=qjI8AjQ2PM8ObtpMnUlZ9yavgfnY_hPGgtIs_SuGMYY&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=2), releases. Inspired by true events, the powerful movie explores the persecution of Christians in the Middle East. In our 45-minute conversation, Jim covers a lot of topics, including his passionate call for believers to stand boldly for Christ in a culture that would rather cancel our voice. There is even a unique moment where God seems to be talking with Jim through a loud rumble of thunder! But what Jim shares in the last part of our conversion will blow you away. He specifically asked to share something with all of you that Hollywood would never allow him to do. | [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNHLBFFOfhbeBmkpWhJc2HdPJTDmijG-0lCm5sgKQ3vugZ-Mqq9VThiXFEz1oUST7nauar1aRvCBeF3ZgS5JIsm&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=3 "WATCH HERE") [WATCH HERE](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNHLBFFOfhbeBmkpWhJc2HdPJTDmijG-0lCm5sgKQ3vugZ-Mqq9VThiXFEz1oUST7nauar1aRvCBeF3ZgS5JIsm&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=4)
---
Be inspired by watching our conversation. And then make sure you are preparing to uphold biblical values at the ballot box on November 3 by visiting our Voting Assistance Center [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC91LVCo5Jjtjzf_vvipaiOHV&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=5).
**Pray. Think. Vote.**
Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=6)
* * *

Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=7)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=11) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200918com01&n=12)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Tell Donald Trump to stop lying about vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to spread the facts.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8152%2E868730%2Eyuv4Tg) Friend, Another day, another absurd tweet from a president who should be focused on managing the real crisis we're facing. [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/stop-vote-by-mail-attacks/?utm_source=ema_2020-09-18_stopvbmattacks_&source=ema_2020-09-18_stopvbmattacks_&t=4&akid=8152%2E868730%2Eyuv4Tg) Excuse me for sounding like a broken record here, but this is a lie. We know this because Washington state entirely votes by mail, our participation has gone up, and we've had close to zero issues. This is a scare tactic, and it's one that Donald Trump and his GOP enablers continue to double down on time and time again to try to convince people not to trust our democratic process -- or worse, the results if they're not in Trump's favor. **I believe in vote-by-mail not because I _think_ it'll work -- I _know_ it does. [If you agree, add your name to tell Donald Trump to STOP attacking vote-by-mail and start making voting more equitable and easier for all Americans.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/stop-vote-by-mail-attacks/?utm_source=ema_2020-09-18_stopvbmattacks_&source=ema_2020-09-18_stopvbmattacks_&t=5&akid=8152%2E868730%2Eyuv4Tg)** Very truly yours, Jay | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/stop-vote-by-mail-attacks/?utm_source=ema_2020-09-18_stopvbmattacks_&source=ema_2020-09-18_stopvbmattacks_&t=6&akid=8152%2E868730%2Eyuv4Tg)

clean_body: | | | | Peter, There' still time remaining to sign up for Mark Ronchetti's Sleeves-Rolled-Up Saturday! Across the state, supporters will be safely and responsibly knocking on doors and making calls to support Mark’s campaign. The single most effective way to encourage a voter to support Mark is by hearing from other supporters like YOU! Whether this is your first time helping a campaign or if you’ve been doing it for years, we’ll take the time to walk through it with you to ensure you have everything you need to have a great time and follow COVID-19 safe practices. If you have questions ahead of time, please contact me at mailto:info@markronchetti.com?subject=Sleeves Rolled Up Saturday&body=! | We hope we can count on you! Matthew Henderson Political Director PS: Every day counts and every door we knock on or call we make gets us one voter closer to victory! Time is running out and we need your help! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Horrific act against two officers, Lyft chooses sides, 1776 Unites, and more
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20262-a4c33d718cbb43d58f69eb3a04e7b2bb/74/856/9b0c4699-5405-451d-8328-096c7d988f6b)** This week our nation was rocked by one of the most horrific acts of violence against a police officer we've seen in a long time. After months of protesting, rioting, and vitriolic anti-police rhetoric from far-left radicals and elected Democrats, two officers were targeted by a lone gunman while onlookers laughed. The gunman ambushed two Los Angeles police officers in their squad car, shooting both at point-blank range. After being laughed at by some who witnessed the attack, the officers were rushed to a local hospital. But, before they could make it inside to receive treatment for their life-threatening injuries, protesters blocked the entrance to the emergency room, shouting "we hope they die." This is the environment Democrats have fostered with their support for BLM and Antifa. It is a fact that their silence, appeasement, and acceptance of violent riots and vitriolic anti-police rhetoric has allowed for continued violent escalation against our brave men and women in uniform. In 2020 thus far, almost 40 US police officers have been killed in the line of duty, 8 of them were victims of this same type of ambush attack. This is absolutely unacceptable and Democrats have done nothing to stop it. Only now are they coming forward to offer weak, hollow condemnation, and only because polling shows that Americans don’t like it. To their shallow words, we say too little, too late. The fault lays at the feet of cowards like Joe Biden whose prolonged silence only fanned the flames of this escalation. Their actions are shameful and the American people must remember what Democrats have done. | |

ICYMI: Our own Jenny Beth Martin took a stand this week calling out the ride-sharing app Lyft for what she called a potential "illegal corporate contribution."

Earlier this week, Lyft announced that it had partnered with More Than A Vote, an advocacy group led by athletes including LeBron James, to provide free/discounted rides to polling locations in major cities in 5 key battleground states of Florida, Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, and Wisconsin.

Jenny Beth exposed the true motives behind the company’s offer, saying:

“They are choosing sides. If they were NOT choosing sides, they would be offering discounts on ANY ride to the polls on Election Day ANYWHERE in the country...

By announcing that they want to offer discounts in a) urban areas (where Democrats dominate) and b) battleground states (where the contest will be closest), they are making clear that they have decided to help the Biden-Harris ticket.”

**[The Washington Times has the story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjYyLWE0YzMzZDcxOGNiYjQzZDU4ZjY5ZWIzYTA0ZTdiMmJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnRpbWVzLmNvbS9uZXdzLzIwMjAvc2VwLzE3L2x5ZnRzLXVyYmFuLXZvdGVyLXR1cm5vdXQtcGxhbi01LWJhdHRsZWdyb3VuZC1zdGF0Lz9taWQ9NDI2ODImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=n0JJDsnCSUoZ-XaGwyVLuQ)**

GOP House candidate Madison Cawthorn of North Carolina pledged to never kneel for the American flag, saying, “To be born an American is a gift from God.”

The 25-year-old Cawthorn — who is paralyzed from the waist down — promised in a campaign video shot on a football field that he would not kneel regarding other matters, either.

The issues he listed as he made his way down the field included mobs, socialism, and globalism.

“They kneel to those who want to hollow out our middle class, destroy our businesses, open our borders, and close our schools,” Cawthorn said.

“I’m tired of being represented by cowards who kneel,” he said.

**[The Patriot Project has the story.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjYyLWE0YzMzZDcxOGNiYjQzZDU4ZjY5ZWIzYTA0ZTdiMmJi%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2ktd2lsbC1uZXZlci1rbmVlbC1tYWRpc29uLWNhd3Rob3JuLXJpc2VzLW91dC1vZi13aGVlbGNoYWlyLXRvLXB1dC1hbnRoZW0ta25lZWxlcnMtdG8tc2hhbWUvP21pZD00MjY4MiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=SCd_MAtkIxgESFACgw5nog)**

If you haven't already, you need to check this out...

1776 Unites, which describes itself as "a nonpartisan and intellectually diverse alliance of writers, thinkers, and activists focused on solutions to our country’s greatest challenges in education, culture, and upward mobility" has released their latest recommendations for K-12 education curriculum.

The curriculum reportedly offers "authentic, inspiring stories from American history that show what is best in our national character and what our freedom makes possible even in the most difficult circumstances."

But, unlike the debunked 1619 Project, 1776 Unites provides a "special focus on stories that celebrate black excellence, reject victimhood culture, and showcase African-Americans who have prospered by embracing America’s founding ideals."

clean_body: This week our nation was rocked by one of the most horrific acts of violence against a police officer we've seen in a long time. After months of protesting, rioting, and vitriolic anti-police rhetoric from far-left radicals and elected Democrats, two officers were targeted by a lone gunman while onlookers laughed. The gunman ambushed two Los Angeles police officers in their squad car, shooting both at point-blank range. After being laughed at by some who witnessed the attack, the officers were rushed to a local hospital. But, before they could make it inside to receive treatment for their life-threatening injuries, protesters blocked the entrance to the emergency room, shouting "we hope they die." This is the environment Democrats have fostered with their support for BLM and Antifa. It is a fact that their silence, appeasement, and acceptance of violent riots and vitriolic anti-police rhetoric has allowed for continued violent escalation against our brave men and women in uniform. In 2020 thus far, almost 40 US police officers have been killed in the line of duty, 8 of them were victims of this same type of ambush attack. This is absolutely unacceptable and Democrats have done nothing to stop it. Only now are they coming forward to offer weak, hollow condemnation, and only because polling shows that Americans don’t like it. To their shallow words, we say too little, too late. The fault lays at the feet of cowards like Joe Biden whose prolonged silence only fanned the flames of this escalation. Their actions are shameful and the American people must remember what Democrats have done. | | Everybody knows what the main event is when it comes to the November elections. It doesn’t get much bigger than choosing between four more years of President Donald Trump or the start of the Joe Biden era. | ICYMI: Our own Jenny Beth Martin took a stand this week calling out the ride-sharing app Lyft for what she called a potential "illegal corporate contribution." Earlier this week, Lyft announced that it had partnered with More Than A Vote, an advocacy group led by athletes including LeBron James, to provide free/discounted rides to polling locations in major cities in 5 key battleground states of Florida, Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, and Wisconsin. Jenny Beth exposed the true motives behind the company’s offer, saying: “They are choosing sides. If they were NOT choosing sides, they would be offering discounts on ANY ride to the polls on Election Day ANYWHERE in the country... By announcing that they want to offer discounts in a) urban areas (where Democrats dominate) and b) battleground states (where the contest will be closest), they are making clear that they have decided to help the Biden-Harris ticket.” Ride-sharing company Lyft’s new turn-out-the vote effort in cities in five battleground states has sparked outrage from conservatives who think it is a ploy to help Democrats win in November. | GOP House candidate Madison Cawthorn of North Carolina pledged to never kneel for the American flag, saying, “To be born an American is a gift from God.” The 25-year-old Cawthorn — who is paralyzed from the waist down — promised in a campaign video shot on a football field that he would not kneel regarding other matters, either. The issues he listed as he made his way down the field included mobs, socialism, and globalism. “They kneel to those who want to hollow out our middle class, destroy our businesses, open our borders, and close our schools,” Cawthorn said. “I’m tired of being represented by cowards who kneel,” he said. GOP House candidate Madison Cawthorn of North Carolina pledged to never kneel for the American flag, saying, “To be born an American is a gift from God.” | If you haven't already, you need to check this out... 1776 Unites, which describes itself as "a nonpartisan and intellectually diverse alliance of writers, thinkers, and activists focused on solutions to our country’s greatest challenges in education, culture, and upward mobility" has released their latest recommendations for K-12 education curriculum. I’ll get right to the point.
Friend,

I’ll get right to the point. In less than a week, Vote by Mail ballots will be landing in mailboxes here on the Suncoast, which means voting in this election will begin in just a matter of days.

**This is a big deal, friend.**

Next week, voters will have the opportunity to cast their ballots in this race and we must reach out to these voters before they cast their vote. That’s going to take a significant amount of resources and that’s why I’m reaching out to you right now.

We’ve set a new online fundraising goal to raise $20,000 over the next week, so as soon as voters receive their ballots, we have the resources we need to reach them on TV, through the mail, and online. If we don’t reach this goal, we won’t have the resources we need to ensure that we are able to communicate with the voters we need to reach.

**[Can you rush an urgent contribution right now to help us reach our fundraising goal, so we can contact voters who will be receiving their ballots next week? Your contribution will go directly towards funding our critical outreach efforts as voters begin voting by mail in this election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19280752/252501152/1073285021?refcode2=2b55d1ac-e9f9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emci=2955d1ac-e9f9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=2b55d1ac-e9f9-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=091820-es-vbm-drop-series-1-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjU1ZDFhYy1lOWY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V41T201im7NksBebxbJkQl_vTG_gD1LDwvIytvpcFTs=)**

name: Jack Doyle, Communications Director
subject: look who Sri’s opponent is with today 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Today, the GOP House Leader Kevin McCarthy is showing his willingness to go all in for Troy Nehls. He's holding a closed-door fundraiser for him in Fort Bend , where masks will not be mandated and Washington special interests will be front and center. Nehls, who has dodged voters’ questions about his record throughout the entire campaign, has somehow found time to rub elbows with a Washington politician who is dedicated to killing the ACA, ripping health care away from millions of Americans.

Friend, now is not the time for expensive and unsafe fundraisers with the DC elite.

We need to get Houston on the road to economic recovery while also ensuring that we’re following science-backed protective measures for keeping our community safe.

That’s why I’m proud to be on Team Sri, friend. Sri is fighting for Texans — not DC special interests.

But make no mistake — Troy Nehls will walk away from today’s fundraiser with a warchest, and that’s why we’re reaching out. Can you rush a donation to our grassroots campaign to help us keep up with our opponent’s elite fundraiser?

Chip in now → https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.18_b1_jdcd_all&amount=25

Friend, Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant. As a foreign service officer, he championed American values all over the world, even in places hostile to our interests. He knows how to bring unity around shared values, and in Washington, he’ll do the same thing — all in service to our community here in Texas.

It’s time for that kind of leadership for a change, friend. It’s time for Sri Preston Kulkarni.

And if you agree that it’s time to bring his vision to Washington, we need you in this fight with us. With only 46 days left to go before our election, it’s time to ensure our race has the momentum it needs to win. Chip in now >> http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.18_b1_jdcd_all&amount=25

Thank you,

Jack Doyle
Communications Director
Team Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 7 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.
Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.18_b1_jdcd_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.18_b1_jdcd_all&amount=25
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898 S
UGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

name: Bettina Weiss
subject: We've got Trump's attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1zKVpd3L3aat78-mMEzV_VHgpVQo3d1YT7x-POjp0Xk=/kq0yzIDuWn3wsugsKIjQ58d14Zkldd9lhymHs7cHF9E=)
---
| Peter, Abigail's opponent has made it clear that he will always put the interests of the president and his party before the needs of the Seventh District. Now, the president has taken to Twitter to try and drive up support. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1zKVpd3L3aat78-mMEzV_VHgpVQo3d1YT7x-POjp0Xk=/kq0yzIDuWn3wsugsKIjQ58d14Zkldd9lhymHs7cHF9E=) Trump's tweet just opened a floodgate of national interest in our race. [_**We need to counter this influx of attention and out-of-state cash to keep Abigail 's positive message at the forefront of this race. **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1zKVpd3L3aat78-mMEzV_VHgpVQo3d1YT7x-POjp0Xk=/kq0yzIDuWn3wsugsKIjQ58d14Zkldd9lhymHs7cHF9E=) Abigail's opponent is beholden not just to Trump, but to the Trump brand of political division. **He takes extremism and obstructionism right out of the President 's playbook.** The voters of VA-07 rejected this type of politics in 2018, in favor of Abigail's steady leadership and ability to bring people together for meaningful solutions. This race isn't about tweets. This race is about the people of the Seventh District, and we are running a campaign that puts them first by bypassing the partisan distractions in favor of **open conversations, community engagement, and on-the-ground organizing.** Abigail will always put the people of this community first. [_**Contribute $15, $25, $50, whatever you can today, to show that you have Abigail 's back.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1zKVpd3L3aat78-mMEzV_VHgpVQo3d1YT7x-POjp0Xk=/kq0yzIDuWn3wsugsKIjQ58d14Zkldd9lhymHs7cHF9E=) | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/1zKVpd3L3aat78-mMEzV_VHgpVQo3d1YT7x-POjp0Xk=/kq0yzIDuWn3wsugsKIjQ58d14Zkldd9lhymHs7cHF9E=)
---

Thank you,
_Bettina Weiss_
_Campaign Manager _

name: Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: 🚨 GOP Memo: “Senate Majority is at risk” 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We just got a look inside the GOP war room |
---
Friend,

We could send you email after email about how competitive Georgia is this year, _but sometimes, our opponent just does it better._

This is directly from a memo written by **_the National Republican Senatorial Committee:_** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28f1/5b2c1286/39e0ab54/25f33ea9/3222611757/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_gop_memo?refcode=em_2020_09_18_gop_memo_img") This has been circulating amongst GOP political operatives and mega-donors -- they now know what we've known for MONTHS: **Republicans' stronghold on power in the Senate is coming to an end.**

**[Rush a $20 donation right now to help us keep this momentum going!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28f1/5b2c1286/39e0ab54/25f33ea8/3222611757/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_gop_memo?refcode=em_2020_09_18_gop_memo&amount=20")**

| | **[$10->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28f1/5b2c1286/39e0ab54/25f33eab/3222611757/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_gop_memo?refcode=em_2020_09_18_gop_memo&amount=10")**
---
| **[$20->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28f1/5b2c1286/39e0ab54/25f33ea8/3222611757/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_gop_memo?refcode=em_2020_09_18_gop_memo&amount=20")**
---
| **[Other->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28f1/5b2c1286/39e0ab54/25f33eaa/3222611757/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_gop_memo?refcode=em_2020_09_18_gop_memo")**
---
The GOP talks a big game, friend. _But even they are admitting they are in serious trouble across the country, and especially right here in Georgia._

But here's the thing: **Republicans use memos like this one to solicit donations.** They send it to their mega-donors, and ask them to write big checks for those candidates struggling most _(including David Perdue here in Georgia)._

You know what that means. **_David Perdue is about to get a huge influx of donations from the GOP's corporate war chest._**

**[We've got to be ready to fight back, friend. Can you help?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28f1/5b2c1286/39e0ab54/25f33eaa/3222611757/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_gop_memo?refcode=em_2020_09_18_gop_memo")**

| [YES, I'LL DONATE $20 >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28f1/5b2c1286/39e0ab54/25f33ea8/3222611757/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_gop_memo?refcode=em_2020_09_18_gop_memo&amount=20")
---

Thanks for your help.

Let's win this,

Team Ossoff

body:

** **

** **
**[RSVP today to join us for a conversation with Senator Cory Booker](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19282419/252508696/1799472555?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTJmMDliMS1mMGY5LWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mv3XJwyhO7beYcrjN4x9IAtzWnr9-hshz1EPkqnQEZ4=)**
** **

** **
**Contributions from this event will be directed toward outreach efforts to increase turnout among young voters across West Virginia. **
** **
**From job creation, to college affordability, to health care access, young people understand that there is so much at stake in this election, and data shows that voters under the age of 30 are more likely to support Democrats up and down the ballot. By promoting absentee and early voting to young West Virginians, we can increase turnout and help win elections across the state. **** **
**Please join us on September 24 for a conversation with Senator Booker to discuss why this year’s election is important and how we can all work together to deliver change.**
** **
**Sincerely, **
**Team WVDP **

Team -- We’re quickly coming to the end of the 2020 Election --__it’s just 46 days away!__ Look, this race is tight. Our recent poll showed that we’re neck-and-neck with failed former Congressman Pete Sessions. But he’s well connected to Washington dark money, and all he has to do is pick up the phone and ask for help. __In fact, during the 2018 cycle, just one PAC alone pledged $2.5 million to support him.__ So, that means we have to step up our game. **I don’t need that kind of cash to win. But I do need to have the resources to get my message out to voters.** **That’s why I’m starting up a Mid-Month Fundraising Drive.[_Let’s raise $10,000 by midnight on Sunday. name: Sandy Smith
subject: Trump for Nobel Peace Prize!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2A1ABGMr3Nxmng&b=qCWUuF6YGOunK7KA9a_8Aw)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a pro-Trump Republican who is proud to run with our President in 2020.**

I'm especially proud of the foreign policy successes our President has had on the foreign policy stage. Who would have thought that, in 2020 of all years, the President would have THIS many astounding foreign policy achievements?
_Do you remember when the Democrats and the Fake News Media tried to sell us the lie that Trump would start a nuclear war or something? All those people do is lie- you can never believe them!!!_
Check out this summer:
-Brokered a peace deal between the United Arab Emirates and Israel;
-Brokered a peace deal in the Balkans;
-Arranged ANOTHER Mideast peace deal between Israel and Bahrain.
_Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the agreement will bring economic benefits to the region and it could end the Arab-Israeli conflict.
'The blessings of the peace we make today will be enormous. First, because this peace will eventually expand to include other Arab states. And ultimately, it can end the Arab-Israeli conflict, once and for all,' he said._
_'Second, because the great economic benefits of our partnership will be felt throughout our region. And they will reach every one of our citizens. And third, because this is not only a peace between leaders. It's a peace between people,' he added._
_United Arab Emirates Foreign Minister Abdullah bin Zayed al-Nahyan said the deal was a sign of the change of heart taking place in the Middle East.
'We are already witnessing a change in the heart of the Middle East, a change that will send hope, around the world,' he said._
_Each of the four leaders signed four copies of the Abraham Accords - one in English, one in Hebrew and two in Arabic._
_The leaders also signed a a treaty of peace, diplomatic relations and full normalization and a declaration of peace - three copies of each were signed, one in English, one in Arabic and one in Hebrew. _
Peace in the Middle East with NO blood in the sand. How often do we see this?!?

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2A1ABGMr3Nxmng&b=qCWUuF6YGOunK7KA9a_8Aw)
---

**_But wait there's more- President Trump was nominated for the Nobel Peace Prize for securing peace in the Balkans!_**

_A Swedish lawmaker said Friday that he has nominated the governments of the United States, Kosovo and Serbia for the Nobel Peace Prize for their efforts to secure a peace agreement between the two former Balkan war foes._

_Swedish parliament member Magnus Jacobsson tweeted that he nominated the three governments “for their joint work for peace and economic development, through the cooperation agreement signed in the White House. Trade and communications are important building blocks for peace.”_

_Serbian President Aleksander Vucic and Kosovo Prime Minister Avdullah Hoti signed an economic normalization deal at the White House last week that also calls for Belgrade to move its embassy in Israel to Jerusalem and for mutual recognition by Israel and Kosovo._

_How could we not want to run with President Trump this year? This man is bringing peace to the Middle East and the Balkans! Who else has done that???_

The President can win North Carolina, and I can help him by winning my swing district! [Can you help me win with the President?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2A1ABGMr3Nxmng&b=qCWUuF6YGOunK7KA9a_8Aw)

I stand with our President. His leadership has been outstanding and exceptional!

**Pelosi's Democrats will never help our country like the President has. I'm facing her Deputy Whip- and this fight isn't easy. I've fought him tooth and nail to this point, and I can win this thing, but I need a push from patriots like you!**

[If you also support the President, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2A1ABGMr3Nxmng&b=qCWUuF6YGOunK7KA9a_8Aw) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I stand with Trump! This is a crazy year, but let's make sure the President and his supporters win!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2A1ABGMr3Nxmng&b=qCWUuF6YGOunK7KA9a_8Aw), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield;s record is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=j2A1ABGMr3Nxmng&b=qCWUuF6YGOunK7KA9a_8Aw)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,

Friend — did you hear the big news?

**The National Rifle Association (NRA) just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s reelection campaign!**
**“Hoosiers’ rightful Second Amendment rights are well protected in Indiana by Governor Eric Holcomb. Governor Holcomb proudly signed laws that support law-abiding gun owners, and therefore keep our communities and state safer. And he’s welcomed the NRA’s world-renowned marksmanship championship competitions to their new home in Indiana. We’re proud to give him our endorsement in this race.”**
**\- John Weber, NRA Director of Indiana**
[**Join the NRA and Endorse Eric**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fa6eab0583394794adcf127ef3a2f772&_e=2oan1trOboRA9UZzJIUsBoh0tnTa-vJZyIvtowfSkeW64ww76n1ve8esoo9BM07Z_CdBjKd0Qm5c8EDg1aFKWSPUw6Wlqnfl4sNKvaQJ6qZqcEbb9OHOFz-U9CbAE-i3A_LqTyFkQ_BhcqwYGzr6XIw9pweqfl_XhMjKTOVOcDPtIFXpNEP3zHkm-Wip5tl2Fvfw5jW9dyHqdHfAXC5y2a2QkWldFByYR2BGctQVivedIjZgO69Lr8kDl5DFcgF7ypj_BTXDVca4IvP7ORjTpti3Or0j2VnIf-KC3vddpSbIJSvPK55mbCcfaLeNvrESBRtXsYtM5iyOn7yiecLmAOfREtFs4lEFjnCAFSSQA5pJ-J5_IC8jHrnKEjD6tA17LFvsebmtTxWXJRF8Htp_h91F7imsSYV-vMTv0HoUzWKcdbTXMDOPtSxaTIVksCIFfEzAgzUEiwHdBg2rhaI07XeZdvzwCGJD2IE5CUR5JL4%3D)
_Our Second Amendment isn’t a talking point for Eric, it is personal. In fact, as a certified NRA firearms instructor, First Lady Janet Holcomb has been teaching Hoosiers how to safely exercise their Second Amendment rights for years. _

Eric knows that our Second Amendment rights are sacred and that is why he has worked so hard to create an environment where every law-abiding Hoosier can safely access a firearm. As Governor, Eric has signed into law legislation that:
* **Eliminates state fees on five-year handgun carry permits**
* **Allows law-abiding Hoosier gun owners to register to vote while applying for a carry permit**
* **Creates a Second Amendment-friendly environment by bringing the NRA’s National Marksmanship Competition Center to Indiana’s very own Camp Atterbury in Johnson County**

**Here’s what Eric had to say about the endorsement. **
_“There’s simply no place more friendly or more supportive of the Second Amendment than right here on Hoosier soil. We value our freedom, liberty, and the importance of being able to bear arms and protect and provide for ourselves and our families. That’s a bedrock commitment of mine – as sturdy as our Constitution in protecting our rights.”_
_\- Governor Eric Holcomb_
Hoosier gun owners know that Governor Holcomb has been a strong advocate for our Second Amendment freedoms. If you believe in protecting our Second Amendment rights and want to help Governor Holcomb defend them, follow the NRA and endorse Eric today.
[**Follow the NRA and Endorse Eric**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fa6eab0583394794adcf127ef3a2f772&_e=2oan1trOboRA9UZzJIUsBoh0tnTa-vJZyIvtowfSkeW64ww76n1ve8esoo9BM07Z_CdBjKd0Qm5c8EDg1aFKWSPUw6Wlqnfl4sNKvaQJ6qZqcEbb9OHOFz-U9CbAE-i3A_LqTyFkQ_BhcqwYGzr6XIw9pweqfl_XhMjKTOVOcDPtIFXpNEP3zHkm-Wip5tl2Fvfw5jW9dyHqdHfAXC5y2a2QkWldFByYR2BGctQVivedIjZgO69Lr8kDl5DFcgF7ypj_BTXDVca4IvP7ORjTpv12kP0JVOGEKOLmLq6FyYTUogVJHkTQ1zCd2EoBFSPtGuC_WczyzyVxm1tZwXme5cym1Icurx7PmEieW7QbWPkIHD0eJUOtNL0GBIA_nXyc5HXoTJch2ymy9whJ5nyz6299zrqJXKD8rg__9grLNS4kOV9Rjf9oirQXfaMOPjxnOIAda01xaV4j8SVfoCkiPamtiPbKEvCuoooPkrZJzEQ%3D)
Thank you,
Holcomb Crew

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: Infomercial, Fox & Friends, Military Ballots
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2225)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | It's been another busy week for True the Vote!

* We [called on citizens](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2265) to help ensure counties send their military ballots on time, and joined forces with Army veteran and Fox News host [Pete Hegseth](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2266) and former Navy Seal [Eli Crane](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2267) to raise awareness about the 45-day deadline.
* We released a [guide for voters](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2271) in each state to learn about their state's election processes, key dates, and requirements.
* We launched [this infomercial](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2242) on television in battleground states across the country. And we joined [Fox & Friends](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2272) yesterday to discuss our national campaign to drive citizen engagement in elections.
* The segment captured the attention of many, including [President Trump](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2268) who tweeted and retweeted about True the Vote several times.

With Election Day only 46 days away, True the Vote has continued ramping up its efforts to fight for free and fair elections through citizen engagement. But there are efforts trying to stop us and attempting to silence us at every turn. Today we found out that [Twitter suspended our account](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2273) based on our tweet this week about military voting. We are an election integrity advocacy organization and this tweet was intended to send out information of public interest about deadlines for our military voters based on federal law. ([Click here for the full statute.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2269))

Is Twitter seeking to stifle organizations that are sharing factual information about our upcoming election? Or is Twitter punishing True the Vote after President Trump retweeted our post? Either way, True the Vote has appealed this violation and we need your help to demand that Twitter restore our account immediately so that we can continue sharing information that is critical to voters ahead of this important election.

This is about you and every other volunteer, supporter, and voter across the nation who believe election integrity matters. Join us, and take action! Visit [truethevote.org/action](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=238A502A20A2274) for ways to get involved.

Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK | | It's been another busy week for True the Vote! We to help ensure counties send their military ballots on time, and joined forces with Army veteran and Fox News host and former Navy Seal to raise awareness about the 45-day deadline. We released a in each state to learn about their state's election processes, key dates, and requirements. We launched on television in battleground states across the country. And we joined yesterday to discuss our national campaign to drive citizen engagement in elections. The segment captured the attention of many, including who tweeted and retweeted about True the Vote several times. With Election Day only 46 days away, True the Vote has continued ramping up its efforts to fight for free and fair elections through citizen engagement. But there are efforts trying to stop us and attempting to silence us at every turn. Today we found out that based on our tweet this week about military voting. We are an election integrity advocacy organization and this tweet was intended to send out information of public interest about deadlines for our military voters based on federal law. () Is Twitter seeking to stifle organizations that are sharing factual information about our upcoming election? Or is Twitter punishing True the Vote after President Trump retweeted our post? Either way, True the Vote has appealed this violation and we need your help to demand that Twitter restore our account immediately so that we can continue sharing information that is critical to voters ahead of this important election. This is about you and every other volunteer, supporter, and voter across the nation who believe election integrity matters. Join us, and take action! Visit for ways to get involved. Onward! name: Darin LaHood
subject: Friend, we can’t let this continue

body:
months of anti-police rhetoric has sowed seeds of hate and violence across the country – and now we are reaping the consequences | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05171e7084bd4d869d57f279b2c44652&_e=CL8QIvwPyrXRH659aIsvq5YAXZrcUw-xsAqXtJEHqXsv5FpqPbnwYF4Zszhi5tufb-DYCH98bwbcJ5Y9XjdjiyJSz4e8GE6I9wGTGNpV_IKkulCdC5AAFA4dLF8Rnq5Qo8VKvJGeJpZrXzx2hYsxpKJWSpm_Mi1hwnx67vYjT714IzMuHxeAADyJt2dNrfo0cy_OTe_qeED1jiqDai7yTqPUhuen8ix3fF4DqKPWR8le9y_ZF-nlwtJez2UqUMUN2U4CKNa9FK4UFs6qTNI6k8eBtEHHAZbGIWoimrGyw371XazhfuSc-_1B-Bg5ptI84wNnAe7B1-QH5egcPI11NXoyL_L48rT8WjDKakgLrShjJnAh8fo2GGq-6kQP6oBowATW-2-0X727sC49559CDQ0ebY3gA6mLkZsImdWLXQphBlXH45YaaVHHzM0apS7mcZAlQDZLNaHv6arxWH6iLffzFH5pnf4hP2mjQn-ws54%3D)
|
---
Friend,

The violence that we witnessed against police officers this week has been absolutely horrific – and a sobering reminder of where we are as a country.

Not only were two young police officers ambushed while sitting in their squad car in Los Angeles, California, but they were also met with chants of **“we hope they die”** at the front entrance of the hospital while they were being rushed to receive life-saving treatment.

It’s difficult to find the right words to say after hearing that, but one thing is clear:

**Months of anti-police rhetoric from the Left has sowed nothing but seeds of hate, violence, and disdain for law & order across America – and now we are reaping the consequences.**
[**Add your name: Back the Blue**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05171e7084bd4d869d57f279b2c44652&_e=CL8QIvwPyrXRH659aIsvq5YAXZrcUw-xsAqXtJEHqXsv5FpqPbnwYF4Zszhi5tufb-DYCH98bwbcJ5Y9XjdjiyJSz4e8GE6I9wGTGNpV_IKkulCdC5AAFA4dLF8Rnq5Qo8VKvJGeJpZrXzx2hYsxpKJWSpm_Mi1hwnx67vYjT714IzMuHxeAADyJt2dNrfo0cy_OTe_qeED1jiqDai7yTqPUhuen8ix3fF4DqKPWR8le9y_ZF-nlwtJez2UqUMUN2U4CKNa9FK4UFs6qTNI6kwUpUAqp7Pnh7P4nZHwIXS8vG56s2NSVDKuDM_rBOZqxX7H4mrg9GnJ5mTPymJiiLunhskD9RlMLoZKFnFpvfKBE55nyluXsLa8rbh_J6u3W62x0UYxBpQC9XEb3Z6zVQTXkzYP0nO3VXUrzE-z2QICVw52ZPqNiV2280ueoa8RF8KvmEfjtqLVWfg49iM6wAEmYdvTIw_wCXEzW3J84ChE%3D)
Friend, we cannot afford to let this senseless hate and violence continue to poison our country and endanger more police officers who protect and serve their communities with honor.

**It’s never been more difficult to be a police officer in America – and it’s never been more important to stand up in support of the daily sacrifices they make to keep us safe.**

That’s why I recently took a stand for our local law enforcement officers by signing a pledge to support the David Dorn Back the Blue Act, named in commemoration of a retired St. Louis police captain who was recently shot and killed this year.
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05171e7084bd4d869d57f279b2c44652&_e=CL8QIvwPyrXRH659aIsvq5YAXZrcUw-xsAqXtJEHqXsv5FpqPbnwYF4Zszhi5tufb-DYCH98bwbcJ5Y9XjdjiyJSz4e8GE6I9wGTGNpV_IKkulCdC5AAFA4dLF8Rnq5Qo8VKvJGeJpZrXzx2hYsxpKJWSpm_Mi1hwnx67vYjT714IzMuHxeAADyJt2dNrfo0cy_OTe_qeED1jiqDai7yTqPUhuen8ix3fF4DqKPWR8le9y_ZF-nlwtJez2UqUMUN2U4CKNa9FK4UFs6qTNI6k6wlOPA7DrgB_LicV_7rQVliTxJF_ZFxwmCDGOsRmdM3AHa6p15tSexTHFHrxTl28BY0quXXQiJ1b4_4kBz4wmCi1yfLLNJ2Eu_fst_r3D_1uJNieiBnUaWW0Pxcnbnl39Sq5Y6Uam70RXq_0S83rhHU9-elaXhVLXim1XP2r24vJmljYRvYmrn-PGx0KMMJIhv89awWMSLR4lsQCGjGtEk%3D)
_Will you join me by adding your name to our petition below in support of our police who place their lives on the line every time they put on their uniform?_
[**Add your name: Back the Blue**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05171e7084bd4d869d57f279b2c44652&_e=CL8QIvwPyrXRH659aIsvq5YAXZrcUw-xsAqXtJEHqXsv5FpqPbnwYF4Zszhi5tufb-DYCH98bwbcJ5Y9XjdjiyJSz4e8GE6I9wGTGNpV_IKkulCdC5AAFA4dLF8Rnq5Qo8VKvJGeJpZrXzx2hYsxpKJWSpm_Mi1hwnx67vYjT714IzMuHxeAADyJt2dNrfo0cy_OTe_qeED1jiqDai7yTqPUhuen8ix3fF4DqKPWR8le9y_ZF-nlwtJez2UqUMUN2U4CKNa9FK4UFs6qTNI6kwUd-uiq1CGCm1amUOdGwQPJxcnxv-x67FJ3OBVeiyOMFUiH36StwHZdYzQd16rNrihlZtUq1XFxw3HlBUmrUVaivfJNC9Xs-NguKY_wgkhDZNKgF3KkJ3y1z3liyZiChO1WwpD5QhL3vdmYGiHdtRIQCxRT4pN7oVb6K_BFqaNZfJerF4w0xyLyS-vjjo5aDq-AaxeClo_EUSjUBmgVogE%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

[**Donate Today**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=05171e7084bd4d869d57f279b2c44652&_e=CL8QIvwPyrXRH659aIsvq5YAXZrcUw-xsAqXtJEHqXtxpo4NEfUlLFrTAZh78Lt4AYSsHHfbTt8FHvz0SeMOEug1JHQY0wH8XynuVx12FlMO9QlAS6-Xckub1zUQ3iNgHQakAGxRcIa-MRF31HxBdruQCfaMrGyEJ03lj9K9jGfWmC_WGFLVB-PoK_twkSvFuNMCJzb-89FKY50fkT8qh3Z_ElvIPPZ3IICALgsHu6rA1pOKOgqx-_0mUIHHb_KyN5PXOnnfT8Yg7FUsV_bSzfh2A831CfQ6NnqRjnsJdZ72eX_K3AOf5Cb3AqfewoRRM-ga-HxM2acG0tlo1HRLHOSeHj6K4BHKjjh53RSBH7OxNYf9k1ZvITAu0o3_P980JMbWjhvjA3YkSDA3HH0y_m4CixEk3tXnM35lWQn8ugsDOf8zt3Zxas3MhVAGS5OZ-5YJgsa80tUAMymxShZyv4NHOY_JQO6nFScCmQjO5sw%3D)
