name: Gina Raimondo
subject: get counted today
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
It's easy to feel powerless during a pandemic. So today, I want to give you one concrete thing you can do to help yourself, your community, and the people of Rhode Island. Please take ten minutes to fill out the 2020 Census. We've seen throughout this crisis the importance of a complete count in receiving the necessary federal funding to keep Rhode Islanders safe during these unprecedented times. And that's why the census so important. We only get the chance to update our census count every 10 years - and right now, we have 12 days left to make sure every Rhode Islander is counted.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RrDzRcFA1H0adPQ8s0-1ox2IDI9FMLX6qeyKfmpxcEsR8ixMS7beny8nieKkspEOVre1kkSfrwDdrF8_U8pDQtiHIrdmdUd9DavLR6r-mWed_i2Uf_cDwSmuabNiKNE6amwPNdaoqKM=&c=flWnPmMs7JY3fRV5N7_LR2OAn2RXdNKgvaYgq508X5j6PAVM4odl_Q==&ch=UslGb7r3ArxlgIbK_V0vobvPaHEi5u-ZRhoUqyVjC-UYzufAKmLTKQ==)
---
| I joined the United Way of Rhode Island, Rhode Island Complete Count Committee, and our congressional delegation today to urge Rhode Islanders to get counted. You can watch the event [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RrDzRcFA1H0adPQ8s0-1ox2IDI9FMLX6qeyKfmpxcEsR8ixMS7beny8nieKkspEOkxGqkdoATyOt4K778FCuAY5_NPvyPTeZr3d6aOlvf3Y4qLHDDBpDL66vczNxRug4OgbquAlD_zCleiTMmzoD2-1gBxR7YCM_QFNBguRlnowS5FjgRCP3TNkjDUagUdzY&c=flWnPmMs7JY3fRV5N7_LR2OAn2RXdNKgvaYgq508X5j6PAVM4odl_Q==&ch=UslGb7r3ArxlgIbK_V0vobvPaHEi5u-ZRhoUqyVjC-UYzufAKmLTKQ==).
---
| This year alone, more than $3.8 billion in funding depends on an accurate census count. That's equivalent to almost 40 percent of our annual budget. And with a shortened enumeration period in the midst of a global pandemic, the stakes are higher than ever. Census funding supports education, housing, healthcare, infrastructure and so much more. We need you to stand and be counted in order to ensure that Rhode Island receives the funds it needs for you, your family, and your neighbors. Together, we all need to make one last push to complete our census. I know that there's a lot going on these days, but taking 10 minutes to fill out the census will make a difference in Rhode Island for the next 10 years. Please, go to [2020Census.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RrDzRcFA1H0adPQ8s0-1ox2IDI9FMLX6qeyKfmpxcEsR8ixMS7beny8nieKkspEOVre1kkSfrwDdrF8_U8pDQtiHIrdmdUd9DavLR6r-mWed_i2Uf_cDwSmuabNiKNE6amwPNdaoqKM=&c=flWnPmMs7JY3fRV5N7_LR2OAn2RXdNKgvaYgq508X5j6PAVM4odl_Q==&ch=UslGb7r3ArxlgIbK_V0vobvPaHEi5u-ZRhoUqyVjC-UYzufAKmLTKQ==) and fill our your census -- and make sure your friends and family do, too.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RrDzRcFA1H0adPQ8s0-1ox2IDI9FMLX6qeyKfmpxcEsR8ixMS7beny8nieKkspEOp6OJCCtq3o92d-bbsPH5cxCBFkMm9mkBMubGuqeRxdHcm-n2rTZIjMQ5FY00tvRBtqF0fu3--OL0gc36MOgYC_qoIm-cuzb_6-Hkg5v5Ud9I15fMU1TFmCrioi9dT4hWBEGJZv92dnCmp3pUjR-RVjY22SHA8A1UeJgZci5uQ245iKZI9H3KjcS4u8Iux_Y_Jfq5_kSZwFnEX5ux74OQ28HD9ZY-sLedwssKnq5JfHKuYx9PUqnzlW3zLRoAFVYBHiHECcDw8kw=&c=flWnPmMs7JY3fRV5N7_LR2OAn2RXdNKgvaYgq508X5j6PAVM4odl_Q==&ch=UslGb7r3ArxlgIbK_V0vobvPaHEi5u-ZRhoUqyVjC-UYzufAKmLTKQ==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RrDzRcFA1H0adPQ8s0-1ox2IDI9FMLX6qeyKfmpxcEsR8ixMS7ben1Q_Kvo070zvpndu69ZBhriAzTG9ntrBXXD79cEYiAn-wOtYewbX-hObiNfSA3MjKp8nsqeXMzyUHje8klzU7cmFmF9Tx28SC0nTICz8NsUm2WcV72uBazdGVnfzTIRB3IvQ6hugMGzle_PfpRJTwpM=&c=flWnPmMs7JY3fRV5N7_LR2OAn2RXdNKgvaYgq508X5j6PAVM4odl_Q==&ch=UslGb7r3ArxlgIbK_V0vobvPaHEi5u-ZRhoUqyVjC-UYzufAKmLTKQ==)

My next book, "Leading America" hits bookshelves in less than a month, pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/154605944X/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&camp=1789&creative=9325&creativeASIN=154605944X&linkCode=as2&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=fd1982c99e14e6630a6d1e91c469e7aa&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) .

Next week on Spicer&Co we're doing a week long special on the religious vote, our guests include: Reverend Franklin Graham, Ralph Reid and others.

Tune into Spicer&Co tonight at 6p on Newsmax, we have the Hong Kong virologist, Li-Meng Yan, who claims she has evidence the Coronavirus was created in a lab in Hong Kong joining us.

https://youtu.be/5Nu-IMktO2A?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193
Exclusive one-on-one with Trump Campaign Political Director Chris Carr

Subscribe to my YouTube Channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193)
Highlights from Spicer&Co this week:
* Exclusive one-on-one with the Political Director of the Trump Campaign, Chris Carr (https://youtu.be/5Nu-IMktO2A?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193)
* Tom Fitton of Judicial Watch (https://youtu.be/37SCnqPOqhA?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) exposes US Embassy in Ukraine for spying on US citizens like Donald Trump, Jr, Laura Ingraham, Sean Hannity and more.
* Dr. Michael Savage (https://youtu.be/S-1atk5cydM?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) on the hypocrisy in the media and on the left.
* Former Director of White House Domestic Policy Council, Joe Grogan reflects on who on the Coronavirus (https://youtu.be/VQlDu8QMiho?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) task force took the virus seriously.
* State Department Spokesperson Morgan Ortagus discusses (https://youtu.be/PKbIzk6Ljq8?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) the historic peace deal in the middle east that President Trump signed
* The Chair of America First Action SuperPAC Linda McMahon (https://youtu.be/aQhrYwjoxf0?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) on America First's ad blitz.

Coming up next week on Spicer&Co:
* Reverend Franklin Graham
* Steve Krauker from the Fourth Watch
* Trump Campaign's Boris Epshteyn
* Country Star Sara Evans
* Dave Rubin of the Rubin Report
* Alan Dershowitz
* and more, tune in every weeknight at 6p on Newsmax, find your channel here (http://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) .

https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/154605944X/ref=as_li_tl?ie=UTF8&camp=1789&creative=9325&creativeASIN=154605944X&linkCode=as2&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=db8d2115476cfdd7eef1d7594eb89f98&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193

Only One Month Until Leading America

My second book, "Leading America" is less than a month away. I'm looking forward to it's release and you all reading it (or listening to it if you're an audiobook person).

I take a deep dive into my journey on "Dancing with the Stars" and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. It's even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward, and why the election this November is the most important of our lifetimes.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but I would really appreciate your support if you could pre-order it now!

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3e679cbd12-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_07_30_06_30&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3e679cbd12-&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=64bbce28bb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_09_15_03_12&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-64bbce28bb-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: REMINDER: Join The Team Hunt Day of Action TOMORROW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**REMINDER: Join The Team Hunt Day Of Action**

Remember to join the Team Hunt Day of Action tomorrow at 10:00am as we work to share our message with our neighbors throughout the 7th District.

With just 45 days until Election Day, every effort makes a difference. Whether you're knocking on doors, sending texts or making calls to 7th District voters, you are bringing us closer to victory this November.

From supporting our police officers to defending Houston's energy jobs and protecting families from crushing tax rates, we have an important message to deliver to Houston voters and we need your help to do so.

We hope to see you tomorrow! If you plan to attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com.

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: LISA SCHELLER WILL GET OUR ECONOMY MOVING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
LISA SCHELLER WILL GET OUR ECONOMY MOVING

Lisa Scheller is a small business owner, not a career politician. Lisa first
got involved in politics when someone raised taxes here in the Lehigh Valley
and she wanted to help those in her community by fighting burdensome
regulations and cutting taxes. Lisa knows how to clean up the mess in
Washington, unlike our current representative, Socialist Susan. Lisa knows how
to balance a budget, how to cut excess spending, how to point-blank get our
economy moving again. She knows how to do that because she has already done it
within her business, Silberline manufacturing. Her company employs 150
hard-working Pennsylvanians that manufacture goods here in America and export
those goods around the world.

The worldwide pandemic has brought our nation to a screeching halt, which in
turn, reflects many hardships, especially on our small businesses. There is no
question about it, we need to stimulate our economy. Supporting local
businesses means supporting our local economy. After all, the people who own
these businesses are our friends and our neighbors.

Susan Wild has forgotten about our friends and neighbors. She is a career
politician and an attorney who seems to have no understanding of what it takes
to balance a budget. Socialist Susan and House Democrats have blocked the
Paycheck Protection Program loans for small businesses in our community to try
and score political points while our economy has been continuing to suffer. The
PPP is a loan designed to provide a direct incentive for small businesses to
keep their workers on the payroll. Unfortunately, Susan is only concerned about
keeping the status quo with Nancy Pelosi and the Squad, not the businesses that
reside here in Pennsylvania.

Now, why would Susan Wild not want to help small businesses suffering in the
Lehigh Valley?

It is because she does not want the economy to open back up. She wants to use
this as leverage to institute things like the Green New Deal, Medicare for All,
and Sanctuary Cities. Susan Wild is holding our economy hostage until she gets
what she wants... and let me tell you, it isn’t what the hard-working people of
Pennsylvania’s 7th congressional district want.

Socialist Susan doesn't want you to go back to work, school, or resume your
normal life as you knew pre-pandemic. She wants you to stand by and suffer so
that she can force medicare for all on the citizens of Pennsylvania. Susan Wild
does not care about you, she only cares about her radical socialist agenda.

The people in our community deserve a representative that will fight for them
and fight to get their life back to the way it was. This “New Normal” will not
cut it, and Lisa Scheller will take her business experience and get our economy
moving again.

Brooke Race
Communications Director

Scheller for Congress

Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.
Unsubscribe
<http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=ad9fea43a7424c08940fd62112090a96&_t=2GpgG2vMNBjm8eGyivzBNh4CL0eQB5wYENCMWv8e6rU_6uCzS5OPNbeP1_Nt_UBCkvQKzL3m3n33agsWNVd9JSWm4b9xIOVcAUVdytO9cjcS-ap5BOYpOYMSFFC3FgM7kXMi3vsafTHunxingxBGgj5Z8QxPsHxdXYSe-BtB26U%3D>

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Here's the record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need people to see this.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f59/7f51f7bc/4538c999/4efa074d/287297791/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

I got into this race because I didn't see our state's so-called leaders like Sen. Cornyn working for the people he's supposed to represent. As a working mom and combat veteran, I understand the struggles working families across Texas deal with every day -- and we know Sen. Cornyn isn't fighting for us.

**[I'm going to get into Sen. Cornyn's record, but if you're already with me, will you make a donation now to help me beat him and flip the Senate this November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f59/7f51f7bc/4538c999/4efa074c/287297791/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200918.2nd__2120__&amount=10")**

When Sen. Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and even now in a pandemic standing by as his allies work to gut the law in court -- he's shown us he's working for big insurance companies, not for Texans.

When Sen. Cornyn accepted a large donation from the NRA shortly after a deadly mass shooting in our state and then refused to take even modest action on gun violence, he showed us he's working for the gun lobby, not for Texans.

When Sen. Cornyn watered down his own drug pricing legislation after taking numerous huge donations from pharmaceutical companies' corporate PACs, he showed us he's working for Big Pharma, not for Texans.

It's no wonder a recent poll found Sen. Cornyn ahead by just one point. He's beatable -- but he's seen the numbers too, and he's calling in big favors from friends like the Koch network.

**I need your help to fight back and keep our momentum going. Please pitch in today to help us do it, if you 're able.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

Thanks -- now let's win this race.

MJ Hegar

clean_body: We need people to see this. | "" | | Peter, I got into this race because I didn't see our state's so-called leaders like Sen. Cornyn working for the people he's supposed to represent. As a working mom and combat veteran, I understand the struggles working families across Texas deal with every day -- and we know Sen. Cornyn isn't fighting for us. "" When Sen. Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and even now in a pandemic standing by as his allies work to gut the law in court -- he's shown us he's working for big insurance companies, not for Texans. When Sen. Cornyn accepted a large donation from the NRA shortly after a deadly mass shooting in our state and then refused to take even modest action on gun violence, he showed us he's working for the gun lobby, not for Texans. When Sen. Cornyn watered down his own drug pricing legislation after taking numerous huge donations from pharmaceutical companies' corporate PACs, he showed us he's working for Big Pharma, not for Texans. It's no wonder a recent poll found Sen. Cornyn ahead by just one point. He's beatable -- but he's seen the numbers too, and he's calling in big favors from friends like the Koch network. I need your help to fight back and keep our momentum going. Please pitch in today to help us do it, if you 're able. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks -- now let's win this race. MJ Hegar "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

name: Taylor Campaign
subject: Thank you, Peninsula!
body:
---
| | | | | | Friday, September 18th 2020
---
|
---
| Thank you, Peninsula!
---
| | |
---|---
|
We spent the day visiting small businesses around the Peninsula - thank you for having us! It was an honor to meet with many constituents of the Second District, especially to hear about their livelihoods and learn more about their experiences through a pandemic.

We also had the opportunity to spend time with local sheriff's deputies and local firefighters. Thank you to all of our law enforcement and first responders for your commitment to our communities - today and every day.

Scott even had the chance to sight in his rifle! The rain did not put a damper on the eventful day spent with many enthusiastic folks of all backgrounds and careers.
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
You can GO VOTE NOW!

Cast your vote ...early and in-person!

Show your ID at your local voter registrar office and vote the entire November ballot every weekday! There are some extended hours on Thursday nights and Saturdays, too!

Ensure that your vote is counted & that you miss the hectic lines of Election Day.

Find your local information, like hours and location, visit:

clean_body: | | | | | | Friday, September 18th 2020 | | Thank you, Peninsula! | | | ---|--- | We spent the day visiting small businesses around the Peninsula - thank you for having us! It was an honor to meet with many constituents of the Second District, especially to hear about their livelihoods and learn more about their experiences through a pandemic. We also had the opportunity to spend time with local sheriff's deputies and local firefighters. Thank you to all of our law enforcement and first responders for your commitment to our communities - today and every day. Scott even had the chance to sight in his rifle! The rain did not put a damper on the eventful day spent with many enthusiastic folks of all backgrounds and careers. | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | You can GO VOTE NOW! Cast your vote ...early and in-person! Show your ID at your local voter registrar office and vote the entire November ballot every weekday! There are some extended hours on Thursday nights and Saturdays, too! Ensure that your vote is counted & that you miss the hectic lines of Election Day. Find your local information, like hours and location, visit: | | | == | | == | | | == | | == | Questions? Friend,

It's official: _**Matt Mowers is a Young Gun.**_

What does that mean? It means that NH-1 is one of the top House races in the country, and Matt has what it takes to win.
|

[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=a35e86feba054ed39eddbec3edffc2d1&_e=sp2DhH_77DclNs-vhVYwXgKBWDDega_VXyPSkz4VstVX4rFqntgqymKQrXA-zeDextd3vdo0jJqx54IujGM7vOFxfY3ZIosbNaNgJM0rn3G0t2gaPugbFVvQDlQr1r8Od7n7h1CvdUhlBGW-5dNnvLuJxj_sq5EcwezQFIL5tK0oqCYWKCvLkcEG2nasPAS2eJxxWpJvxTYxCn1ljzYGIjTs7-Z4vIAz6xGpK_t-Kta38h-DexREDnb-e2M0Dujj5lXyoVCNZSYLIbJBUwLk9YneFSU8Baq6QDOyX4a8YqAPSaLPTiQjA5kRAf9qOsB6toEgL68fPAeEMRyd6kNnxwA2J1J67yz0o5e3Z8TNYeB_uDGwzhpW35zyqevQ1WRenYI6BE4r8OQC-ZvikvQXX2yRuNC4hUFLLISQowIGjbeoND2aP6UpN-PBs9e1vYHN-I1LaLnAii86VsaqHZucyBCBFhB7_M_udfwPKT42HV5Mx1VEf8LKy14tbIClfarD)

It's not easy to earn this distinction.

At the NRCC, it's our job to build a Republican majority in the House. So we start tracking races early. We've been following Matt Mowers’ campaign since the beginning. At every evaluation point, we ask:
* Is this one of our **most critical** races to win?
* Does the candidate have the **funds** to win?
* Does the candidate have the **message** to win?

And at every checkpoint, we've been thrilled. Matt Mowers' strong grassroots army and enthusiastic support from across the First Congressional District means he has what it takes to flip this seat for Republicans.

It's why I have no hesitation in calling his election one of the most important races for conservatives across the country.

**Make no mistake: The path to regaining the majority in the House of Representatives goes through New Hampshire.**

With less than 50 days until Election Day, we need to get into high gear. Nancy Pelosi will be frantically funneling money to Matt’s opponent, her ultra-liberal puppet Chris Pappas. This race won't be easy. But I'm betting on Matt Mowers.

**We can win this race - and we must win this race if we want to flip the House. But we're counting on you, friend.**

_**Will you stand with me, Matt Mowers and the NRCC to take back the House today?**_
|

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Fundraising agreement, interviews, Shaheen on the sidelines, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Veteran. Businessman. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/108abf4a4075600b/14b3f0bc77fcadd9c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/108abf4a4075600b/b084f2c2928b28dcc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**First Week of Campaign Focuses on Funding Pledge**
If the week after our primary victory is any indication, it’s going to be an action-packed campaign leading to the Nov. 3 general election. Corky focused on ‘clean’ elections, as his effort to defeat U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen continued.

In response to Senator Shaheen’s request that Corky agree to a Clean Elections Pledge, our campaign pointed out the pledge that rails against special interest “dark money” funding is a political stunt that has been tried by Democrat candidates in New Hampshire many times before.

In response, Corky signed an amended agreement. Like the original, it includes provisions to ensure candidates agree not to solicit the support of adversarial foreign third parties and that they will oppose illegal tactics to suppress the vote. Corky still awaits Senator Shaheen's signature on the amended agreement, which also calls for both candidates to agree not to accept and to refund contributions or any other form of monetary support from individuals or entities based in the State of California.

As senior campaign advisor Michael Biundo noted this week: "Senator Shaheen is a professional politician that has perfected the art of talking out of both sides of her mouth. The fact is, she's been the beneficiary of nearly $30 million of outside money during these last two election cycles, yet here she is pledging to stand up to "dark money" now? The special interests in Washington have propped up her political career, and no phony pledge stunt is going to change that fact."
|
---
**In The News**
All Corky, all the time – that’s what it seemed like on New Hampshire airwaves this past week, with Corky chatting with radio hosts across the state about why it’s time to retire career politician Jeanne Shaheen.
Check out **[his discussion](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/108abf4a4075600b/63bf04d39b21cd42c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** with Dan Mitchell of WKBK, as the conversation turned to how Senator Shaheen is not doing enough to support Granite Staters in need. And **[Corky also spoke](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/108abf4a4075600b/13f94643cde3883ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to Pulse 101.7’s Peter St. James about recent headlines.
|
---
**Why Does Shaheen Sit on the Sidelines?**
**[Corky’s thoughts](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/108abf4a4075600b/c75fee08a5aeb0f5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** on Senator Shaheen’s do-nothing approach was the topic of an opinion piece that ran in several New Hampshire newspapers and news websites. Specifically, he asks why she voted against the COVID relief bill and points to her continued silence on the crises facing the nation.
Here’s an excerpt:

_Our nation is in turmoil, reeling from the effects of a pandemic that has left us in fear for our health and our economy in shambles. Racial unrest has plagues our cities, and agitators bent on destruction prowl the streets and attack innocent bystanders. Our political dialogue has deteriorated into name-calling and finger-pointing, as America reels from one crisis to another._

_And where is our Senator? She sits on the sidelines and the only stand she takes is not taking one._

_She sits by as her party is hijacked by radical progressives whose agenda includes dismantling of our economy and our society. She sits by as her party leaders look the other way when violence and vandalism terrorize our cities, because they claim the “cause is just.” She sits by as average Americans are belittled for their views, their faith and their way of life._
|
---
**Corky Proposes Six Debates with Rival Shaheen**
Corky is requesting that Senator Jeanne Shaheen agree to six debates in the weeks leading up to the Nov. 3 general election.

As he notes, “These debates will go beyond prepared press releases and photo ops, and serve to demonstrate to Granite Staters how Jeanne Shaheen, after 44 years in politics, has drifted to the radical left and is no longer the moderate champion of bipartisanship she claims to be. More importantly, I look forward to these debates as a chance to further outline my support of individual liberty and economic freedom, and make the case for returning New Hampshire conservatism and common sense to the United States Senate.
Corky believes that through these debates, New Hampshire voters will recognize that their Senator’s inaction on the critical issues we now face, her ineffectiveness in getting Granite Staters the help they need, her blind loyalty to her party’s progressive leadership, and her extreme views no longer represent their values and beliefs, and they will deny her a third term.
|
---
**Campaign Events Set for Around the State**
The quick pace continues this week, as we work to win out over career politician Jeanne Shaheen Nov. 3. Corky works hard to reach out to Granite Staters, and here are a few upcoming events. Check out website regularly -- he’s sure to be in your area soon!

Hudson VFW 4th annual Veteran's Appreciation Picnic
Saturday, September 19 -- 11am to 4pm
Hudson VFW Post 5791, 15 Bockes Rd, Hudson

Annual VFW Picnic
Saturday, September 19 – Noon to 5pm
American Legion Riders Chapter 98, 43 Baboosic Lake Road, Merrimack

Rockingham County Republican Committee Chowderfest
Monday, September 21 -- 5:30 to 7:30pm
218 Wallis Road, Rye

And this past week, among Corky’s travels was a meet-up with the President’s son, Eric Trump, at an event in Portsmouth. He also went north for the opening of the Carroll County Trump Victory office in Conway, with Vice President Pence’s nephew, John Pence, in attendance, and also made a stop in Alton to greet enthusiastic supports and pose for a few pics. Go, Corky!

|
---
**Get Your Corky Signs Today!**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/108abf4a4075600b/578c308f7849bd8ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)
An official Corky for Senate yard sign is a great way to show everyone where you stand and support the campaign! Request yours now before we run out! **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/108abf4a4075600b/a5b860a957377bc8c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to learn more.
|

name: Perdue Files | Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: Jon’s opponent is in another stock trading scandal 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Sen. Perdue has a pattern of corruption. |
---
He has no shame, friend.

After a Senate briefing about the threat of COVID-19 at the beginning of the year, David Perdue dumped casino shares and bought stock in manufacturers of protective medical equipment and vaccines.

**But this stock trading scandal wasn't an isolated incident, friend._Perdue has a pattern of corruption._**

Check out this Daily Beast headline about Jon Ossoff's opponent (and Donald Trump's favorite Senator):
**"Sen. David Perdue Says His Perfectly Timed Stock Trades Are Completely Innocent"**
Here's what actually went down:

**First:** Perdue pushed to roll back regulations on prepaid debit cards.

**Two weeks later:** He acquired stock in an industry leader that stood to benefit from the changes. _(The changes he helped implement!!!)_

**Now:** He's claiming his actions were completely innocent.

Really???

**Friend, this is absurd. Georgia deserves better than a Senator who uses his position to prop himself up.**

**[Can you chip in any amount right now to help us send Perdue packing?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2805/5b2c1286/39eab239/25f3384a/1415654221/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_daily_beast?refcode=em_2020_09_18_daily_beast")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [EXPRESS DONATE: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2805/5b2c1286/39eab239/25f3384d/1415654221/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_18_daily_beast?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_18_daily_beast_ex_10")

This is directly from a legal expert in the article:

**"If somebody was really conscientious about the appearance of impropriety, they'd never trade individual stocks. But Perdue did. He traded large amounts, and they do raise questions about what he knew and when he knew it."**
It's true. But we already know that Perdue will continue to lie to the American people, while doing his best to help himself and his corporate donors.

clean_body: Sen. Perdue has a pattern of corruption. | He has no shame, friend. After a Senate briefing about the threat of COVID-19 at the beginning of the year, David Perdue dumped casino shares and bought stock in manufacturers of protective medical equipment and vaccines. But this stock trading scandal wasn't an isolated incident, friend.Perdue has a pattern of corruption. Check out this Daily Beast headline about Jon Ossoff's opponent (and Donald Trump's favorite Senator): "Sen. David Perdue Says His Perfectly Timed Stock Trades Are Completely Innocent" Here's what actually went down: First: Perdue pushed to roll back regulations on prepaid debit cards. Two weeks later: He acquired stock in an industry leader that stood to benefit from the changes. (The changes he helped implement!!!) Now: He's claiming his actions were completely innocent. Really??? Friend, this is absurd. Georgia deserves better than a Senator who uses his position to prop himself up. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" This is directly from a legal expert in the article: "If somebody was really conscientious about the appearance of impropriety, they'd never trade individual stocks. But Perdue did. He traded large amounts, and they do raise questions about what he knew and when he knew it." It's true. But we already know that Perdue will continue to lie to the American people, while doing his best to help himself and his corporate donors. This is despicable, friend. "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for being in this fight, Team Ossoff | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. | | Hi there! My name is Hope, and I'm Dani's Finance Director. You’ll be hearing more from me in the future but I’m emailing you today because our **end of month deadline** is coming up.

I just met with Dani and had to share some troubling news: we are only **60% of the way towards our fundraising goal for September.**

Every month, we take a hard look at how much money we need to raise to win. A lot goes into these goals, and we're lucky to have so many incredible supporters like you to help get us there. But we're in crunch time now.

The good news is that we can make it up, but only if we raise an additional $18,913 by the end of the week. I know what you are thinking: that sounds like a lot of money. It is! But we have a lot of supporters on this team, and **if everyone chips in a little bit (or a lot, if you can), we can easily hit our goal.**

Can I count on you to help us pick up the pace so that we can win this race and send Dani to Congress? [Chip in here, and let's cross the finish line together.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6342c18ac8&e=140a9b81e7)

Your new best friend,
Hope

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Last night, during a CNN Town Hall, Joe Biden said we need to "transition" away from fracking. The Biden-Harris ticket has it out for New Mexico’s oil and gas industry workers. In the primary, Vice-President Biden noted his desire to “end all oil drilling” and was vocal about his support for a ban on fracking. A sure-fire way to destroy New Mexico’s economy is to handicap our leading industries and raise our taxes. | My opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House Ben Ray Lujan, shares Biden and Harris’ DC pedigree and radical Green New Deal policies. As a meteorologist, I know we can keep our environment AND our economy healthy. Their radical policies do more to satisfy their radical progressive base than to help the environment. | | | Thank you for your continued support, Mark P.S. Biden, Harris, and my opponent, Ben Ray Lujan, will destroy our state's economy and raise our taxes trying to implement the radical Green New Deal. Help me tell more New Mexicans that there is another way: we can protect the economy and the environment. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Raise a noise!
body:
Today is the Jewish holiday of Rosh HaShanah—the start of the New Year.
| | |
Patriot,

Today is the Jewish holiday of Rosh HaShanah—the start of the New Year.

To my Jewish and Christian friends alike, “Shanah tovah um’tukah” (May you have a good and sweet New Year).

For the next two days, on the traditional anniversary of the creation of Adam and Eve, we reflect on humanity’s role in the divinely-created world.

Of all the events in the Jewish calendar, Rosh Hashanah is particularly dear to me. The holiday’s Biblical name is _Yom Teruah_ , which literally means the “day of shouting,” or, “day of putting things on blast.”

Custom dictates sounding a shofar, or ram’s horn, during prayer services to “raise a noise”—a Jewish tradition, and a lifelong vocation, to which I am uniquely dedicated.

**This year, I call on Jews and Christians everywhere to raise a noise in response to the growing threat of anti-Semitism in the West.**

We face a uniquely troubling political landscape in America, in which elected representatives show no hesitation in expressing their contempt for the Jewish people and our greatest ally in the Middle East, Israel. We all have a responsibility to speak out about these moral horrors.

Rosh Hashanah is also a time to think about our shortcomings, and resolve to do better. We are taught that God is especially open to repentance during the High Holidays, so it’s during this time that we can hope for an especially receptive ear.

Tonight, I’ll be dipping apples in honey with my campaign, family and friends with a toast to a sweet new year, looking forward to wholesome and prosperous times to come. We wish you all a happy and healthy new year. _L’shanah tova!_

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b241/18e32a7f/4a82c06d/7b20c0aa/3856409391/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b241/18e32a7f/4a82c06d/7b20c0ab/3856409391/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b241/18e32a7f/4a82c06d/7b20c0a8/3856409391/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b241/18e32a7f/4a82c06d/7b20c0b4/3856409391/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b241/18e32a7f/4a82c06d/7b20c0b6/3856409391/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b241/18e32a7f/4a82c06d/7b20c0a9/3856409391/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Elections Team (Mark Warner for VA)
subject: Early voting in VA starts TODAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
How are you voting in the 2020 general election?
|
---

| | Early voting in Virginia is officially underway!
**What is your plan to vote?** | [Take Mark's one-question survey](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dade/53d9897e/55ea4896/1c8810e0/3112211039/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-voting")
---
Derek,

Early voting in our Commonwealth starts today -- which means Virginians are starting to cast their ballots for Mark Warner and Democrats up and down the ticket.

**Make no mistake: This is the single most important election in our lifetime. The future of progress in Virginia (and the United States) depends on all of us showing up and voting.**

There are many ways to safely and securely vote in Virginia:
* Vote by mail (request an absentee ballot by 10/23)
* Vote early in person (from 9/17 through 10/31)
* Vote in person on Election Day, 11/3

Our team is focused on making sure that every Virginian has the information and resources they need to safely cast their ballot this year. Can you help us out by letting us know how you plan to vote this year?

**[Fill out Mark's quick one-question survey on how you're planning to vote in this critical election.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dade/53d9897e/55ea4896/1c8810e0/3112211039/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-voting")**

Thank you!

-- Elections Team, Mark Warner for Virginia

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dade/53d9897e/55ea4896/1c8810ef/3112211039/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200918_s_1_fl__795__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dade/53d9897e/55ea4896/1c8810ee/3112211039/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

subject: Hitting the target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Leading is about delivering results for the people you serve – and there’s no doubt that Governor Holcomb has a track record of results. You could | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/never-forget-469746?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b4898f177a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Hitting the Target_** Leading is about delivering results for the people you serve – and there’s no doubt that **Governor Holcomb** has a track record of results. You could even say he’s _hitting the target_ for Hoosiers.

Take two big news items this week as examples.

Yesterday, the Trump Administration recognized Indiana as the top state in the entire nation for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care. Indiana Department of Child Services facilitated 2,489 adoptions in fiscal year 2019 alone -- check out more information on that below.

And then some big news today. The National Rifle Association – our nation’s longest-standing civil rights organization – [today endorsed **Governor Holcomb** for a second term](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b8beb5847b&e=1acd9bb3d6), awarding him and **Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch** with an “A” grade for their commitment to protecting our Second Amendment rights.

I’m a lifetime member of the NRA – and I'll tell you that you won’t find bigger supporters of our freedom, liberty and the importance of bearing arms than **Governor Holcomb** and **First Lady Janet Holcomb**.

Last year, **Governor Holcomb** proudly signed into law legislation that eliminates state fees on a five-year license to carry a handgun – protecting a fundamental right for Hoosiers. This same legislation allows Hoosier gun owners to register to vote when they apply for a license to carry a handgun and provides greater protection to gun owners when exercising the right to self-defense.

And you all might remember that **First Lady Janet Holcomb** , as a certified NRA firearms instructor, has been teaching Hoosiers how to safely exercise their Second Amendment rights for years.

**Governor Holcomb** is a pragmatic leader who isn’t afraid of tackling our state’s biggest issues. He goes in with a team effort, and like we’ve seen this week – he hits the target.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_** It’s been another big week for **Governor Holcomb** , with several huge announcements!

This week **Governor Holcomb** announced that Indiana is now the top state in the nation for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care – with 2,489 Hoosier kids adopted in 2019.

**Governor Holcomb **made increasing adoptions a priority of his Next Level Agenda and thanks to his pro-life leadership, Indiana is now the number one state in the nation for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care! As part of this record breaking year of adoptions, the Trump Administration has awarded more than $4.7 million to be used to help even more kids find their forever homes. _**“Every child deserves to have people who will love and support them forever, so we’ve set out to ensure each is a part of a permanent, loving family." - Governor Holcomb**_ **Governor Holcomb** also announced that the popular [l](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bce2161e48&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ocal road funding program Community Crossings](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=31166f17f3&e=1acd9bb3d6) is back! This program helps local communities repair, maintain and improve their roads and bridges – making sure Hoosiers’ first and last miles of their days are durable and safe. As the Crossroads of America, **Governor Holcomb** is committed to keeping us in the pole position when it comes to infrastructure. For more information about Community Crossings, click [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=091a324cef&e=1acd9bb3d6). To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=07ac41ed98&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8966878617&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2950f1fd44&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Indiana State Association of Health Underwriters Endorses Governor Holcomb**_
**Governor Holcomb** has officially been endorsed by the Indiana State Association of Health Underwriters (ISAHU) and ISAHU-PAC. The worldwide pandemic has brought to light the importance of accessible healthcare, and **Governor Holcomb** has been at the forefront of this charge for Indiana and has shown his commitment to these values throughout his first term.

ISAHU President Jennifer Mitchen said, “ISAHU is looking forward to seeing what **Governor Holcomb** will accomplish over the next four years, and is excited for the potential to continue working with him to improve the landscape of the health industry in Indiana.”
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6cf14aa879&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Todd Rokita Earns Indiana State Police Alliance Endorsement**_ On Wednesday, attorney general candidate **Todd Rokita** earned the [endorsement of the Indiana State Police Alliance](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=96b5473079&e=1acd9bb3d6). As our state's attorney general, Todd will always stand with Indiana's brave state troopers and their families. [\--> Watch The Full Endorsement Here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a98875e4b3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fb4fbe8414&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Have you seen Victoria Spartz's new ad?**_ In case you missed it -- **Victoria Spartz** has released her latest campaign ad. **Victoria Spartz** is the conservative leader in the 5th District we need to take on the socialist Democrats in Washington and make health care more affordable -- and she's up for the task! [\--> Click here to check out Victoria Spartz new ad <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e45cbf7dcd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87043b11ab&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | _**2020 Voting Information**_ Time is moving quickly and there are now less than 50 days until the 2020 election. It's crucial you have a plan for how you'll be voting. Don't have a plan yet? Don't worry – we’ve got you covered. For answers to all your voting questions, be sure to visit our [GOP Election Information Center website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=38ce09ae39&e=1acd9bb3d6), which will continue to be updated up until the day of the election. We have all the information you need all in one place.

Election Day is quickly approaching, make sure you have a plan by visiting our information center!
[\--> Click here to visit the GOP election information center <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3fd8f4ec01&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|

You could | | | | | | | | Hitting the Target Leading is about delivering results for the people you serve – and there’s no doubt that Governor Holcomb has a track record of results. You could even say he’s hitting the target for Hoosiers. Take two big news items this week as examples. Yesterday, the Trump Administration recognized Indiana as the top state in the entire nation for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care. Indiana Department of Child Services facilitated 2,489 adoptions in fiscal year 2019 alone -- check out more information on that below. And then some big news today. The National Rifle Association – our nation’s longest-standing civil rights organization – , awarding him and Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch with an “A” grade for their commitment to protecting our Second Amendment rights. I’m a lifetime member of the NRA – and I'll tell you that you won’t find bigger supporters of our freedom, liberty and the importance of bearing arms than Governor Holcomb and First Lady Janet Holcomb. Last year, Governor Holcomb proudly signed into law legislation that eliminates state fees on a five-year license to carry a handgun – protecting a fundamental right for Hoosiers. This same legislation allows Hoosier gun owners to register to vote when they apply for a license to carry a handgun and provides greater protection to gun owners when exercising the right to self-defense. And you all might remember that First Lady Janet Holcomb , as a certified NRA firearms instructor, has been teaching Hoosiers how to safely exercise their Second Amendment rights for years. Governor Holcomb is a pragmatic leader who isn’t afraid of tackling our state’s biggest issues. He goes in with a team effort, and like we’ve seen this week – he hits the target. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building One Indiana For All It’s been another big week for Governor Holcomb , with several huge announcements! This week Governor Holcomb announced that Indiana is now the top state in the nation for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care – with 2,489 Hoosier kids adopted in 2019. Governor Holcomb made increasing adoptions a priority of his Next Level Agenda and thanks to his pro-life leadership, Indiana is now the number one state in the nation for increasing the number of children adopted from foster care! As part of this record breaking year of adoptions, the Trump Administration has awarded more than $4.7 million to be used to help even more kids find their forever homes. “Every child deserves to have people who will love and support them forever, so we’ve set out to ensure each is a part of a permanent, loving family." - Governor Holcomb Governor Holcomb also announced that the popular is back! This program helps local communities repair, maintain and improve their roads and bridges – making sure Hoosiers’ first and last miles of their days are durable and safe. As the Crossroads of America, Governor Holcomb is committed to keeping us in the pole position when it comes to infrastructure. For more information about Community Crossings, click . To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , and ! | | | Indiana State Association of Health Underwriters Endorses Governor Holcomb Governor Holcomb has officially been endorsed by the Indiana State Association of Health Underwriters (ISAHU) and ISAHU-PAC. The worldwide pandemic has brought to light the importance of accessible healthcare, and Governor Holcomb has been at the forefront of this charge for Indiana and has shown his commitment to these values throughout his first term. ISAHU President Jennifer Mitchen said, “ISAHU is looking forward to seeing what Governor Holcomb will accomplish over the next four years, and is excited for the potential to continue working with him to improve the landscape of the health industry in Indiana.” | | | Todd Rokita Earns Indiana State Police Alliance Endorsement On Wednesday, attorney general candidate Todd Rokita earned the . As our state's attorney general, Todd will always stand with Indiana's brave state troopers and their families. | | | Have you seen Victoria Spartz's new ad? In case you missed it -- Victoria Spartz has released her latest campaign ad. Victoria Spartz is the conservative leader in the 5th District we need to take on the socialist Democrats in Washington and make health care more affordable -- and she's up for the task! | | | | 2020 Voting Information Time is moving quickly and there are now less than 50 days until the 2020 election. It's crucial you have a plan for how you'll be voting. Don't have a plan yet? Don't worry – we’ve got you covered. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher Falls Short on Delivery of Coronavirus Relief for Houston
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Fletcher Falls Short on Delivery of Coronavirus Relief for Houston**

Houston, TX - Today marks 175 days since the last successful delivery of coronavirus relief for the American people, conveying a poignant reminder of Representative Fletcher's broken promises to the residents of the 7th District. While Texans have upheld their end of the bargain during the coronavirus, Congress has failed to do the same and the consequences are felt by hardworking families in Houston.

Fletcher and her Democrat colleagues have failed to deliver reasonable and balanced aid to the American people, in large part due to the divisive leadership stemming from the Democrat-controlled House. Instead, they have oscillated from one extreme to another; on one hand, they balked at the notion of spending $3 billion to give energy companies a critical, job-saving lifeline, but on the other hand, they voted to appropriate $16.4 billion for stimulus checks for illegal immigrants. And thanks to their unwillingness to compromise on any of the outlandish demands of the HEROES Act, the needs of the American people have been sacrificed on the alter of Democrat's vision of a government-controlled future for all Americans.

Throughout the past 175 days, Democrats has proven incapable of finding the middle ground or negotiating for legislation that will fairly meet the needs of the more than 330 million Americans they vowed to serve. Instead, they have clung to an unrealistic, partisan strategy that does more to message to the extreme elements of their party than support our country in our time of need.

_"When Lizzie Fletcher ran for Congress in 2018, she pledged to be a moderate willing to work with Republicans for the benefit of Houston. However, to the detriment of 7th District residents, she has done the opposite. Fletcher has failed to rise to the occasion and show leadership when it has mattered most, choosing instead to entrench herself with Nancy Pelosi"_ **said Campaign Manager Jim Hilk.**_"Right now we are looking at 175 days since aid was delivered to the American people and we're still counting. With each day that passes, Congress misses another opportunity to follow through on their promise to serve the American people. The 7th District deserves a leader who will do what is right in times of crisis, not cower behind her party platform and disseminate dishonest reports back to her voters."_

###
****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=3950c00ad7ee42e5ad8eac316cc7a07d&_e=-psZrvCnMaaG2fGzKfRRUvZLy9i-XtvKm-EBZxmyg5qsTEFes0MLQJiAmu0jpin0J0TCqN3BEM5VAVTGP5xravnkegSfEWdDCVBIqYf7qC5uCZ601xiMxzLl8T6wZgPBYBPs9WxcNjd45E9xGauuiMUsBMWtWBxPf8r1qmwVr-hpGw02pkNYoyS4kjm0GLWmCCkyruYYNbINMeAeQL_oVIn2APt2TP8WYKAlQnXp_gFma2K3lHfYFmx6l_HmyElsQC3xfSsofkDqWtqM58sC76JaU5J8EGw4xRwtCYwKF7E%3D)****

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Joe Biden endorsed my opponent…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
Did you see the news? I’m sure you did, but in case you missed it, I wanted to certain you saw that Democratic-Presidential nominee and former Vice Pr Peter, did you see the news?
I’m sure you did, but in case you missed it, I wanted to certain you saw that Democratic-Presidential nominee and former Vice President Joe Biden just endorsed my opponent, Susan Wild: [ ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=951de43e9f3a4ecab824c60207a787dc&_e=AlUmzm1h4H6F2kUEgKyAfMqk20lk9naRXMcF9tMnsKLwEuLRqIKxSIfNcrEU3roXxS2-xPv745h3jAlyMc2G3yxy4fAUSDWVlL5KFKI_OAJoAk7cUazZsF-tlT9QQO4zo0W5Nf2p4QDPytf5Jt2BjSEBsc9PIHK1lXQukpBuYGxt3M3E9x8JpYoE60eiAzZO41bddWjInCRfY_5AMthcv1O2kmKMPxnJafeMEQq3cNKlWaCJ6sC_8P5u2gzlB_zEriJhgB3psuDACrrGVoANnemL-1JmgpvKZnLpAjNtXFBvsFWl-6cFC7FoncJlVOrLrJK1PR3VssmmAScdmSa8uxznoLvPRgzrQPziLVEJRBC9-nz_tYi_lYkxp8UMf0ul2_-aIoOhk_BmX_wrmloRaUY8gvjg9rpaB2lzJw7mYyFIWnF5brrTTEgu9Rf_VisdxQIVxBGT0U6CljPGV-KACw%3D%3D) Peter, there are a lot of endorsements I would not want, and one from Joe Biden is one of those.
This race is one of the biggest, most important races in the country, and big names are coming to try and save their liberal friend Susan Wild. Joe Biden is just the latest in a long list of national Democrats coming to her rescue.
Biden has a lifetime history of tax hikes, wanting to strip away privately-funded healthcare, and standing for socialist views. His views are so intense that even former President Barack Obama said that Joe Biden’s polices are in line with socialists.
If I were Susan Wild, I would be ashamed to receive this endorsement.
The Lehigh Valley is seeking a commonsense leader who stands for their constituents, not strictly for partisanship and obeying their DC bosses.
Peter, we have just under 6 weeks left until election day, and we are pulling out all stops to ensure we beat EVERY fundraising goal in order to defeat Susan Wild on election day.
**[Will you chip in $50 NOW to stop Susan Wild?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=951de43e9f3a4ecab824c60207a787dc&_e=AlUmzm1h4H6F2kUEgKyAfMqk20lk9naRXMcF9tMnsKLwEuLRqIKxSIfNcrEU3roXxS2-xPv745h3jAlyMc2G349PFu9VCf4MRoJuIIQMUiEKrv9P4V4kowrOrsNC5vA-_TH_gnmubwcL2_JFHZ4-wMTSH0-HP6HvipNNctvAvTyoRAy_pdR2Q_htF9wneifIbVukhTTRIqMPrZdrnoagwzhin7EEdenktdLTTRwQuS5ZblpQ0OSKWGjSGxI9CwGRk4H0tch6nrV2O5MlHJ9M55zu9pS3QKT9ygMnlR8tDXmnDE02SOr8Qzw4UHTqjjDbieIBOOyBTm1-xXugKksv8CQ_Sp-EiV1x6vQy8GJ8H8qZKuZsnd-Gb2YB7Dnt1uA1cPln_YjjPMDczluxEtixDtxmC5wMQplao67oiz36oBlTz_QW6ENpRIDuGjlmLg__82ap63Y5Wjzjd-CtPm1PWWjfaYtHUJdRGnsKOdmJkOU%3D)**
**[We’re counting on you, Peter. Your help is needed to help us take back PA-07.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=951de43e9f3a4ecab824c60207a787dc&_e=AlUmzm1h4H6F2kUEgKyAfMqk20lk9naRXMcF9tMnsKLwEuLRqIKxSIfNcrEU3roXxS2-xPv745h3jAlyMc2G3yxy4fAUSDWVlL5KFKI_OAJoAk7cUazZsF-tlT9QQO4zo0W5Nf2p4QDPytf5Jt2BjSEBsc9PIHK1lXQukpBuYGxt3M3E9x8JpYoE60eiAzZO41bddWjInCRfY_5AMthcv1O2kmKMPxnJafeMEQq3cNLe0mvA4YQXzKDPktvK--M5w-SONbG93GOWSvtylf5tpJioNzRjZA-z7tU2tJDhNj7VWyaX7h2-ZvVZxlCcQI0o6FdXbsKuLoI-Ajt7lz8NXm9uLbzNiu3Tkb66dofKuMFsLX9S1Neoaxx0caPynUqzk0Ehr4C5o9eqFbjQNRTXmQX7ga3yhbF21gwTMSEfzf3lMzGp27SXFFMgJ6vusJHndLiO9qbzatxUcIH7oNmeIw%3D%3D) ** Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
“There is no greater measure of presidential significance than a chief executive's ability to transform not just his own but also the..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54d6a6f4aa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**How Trump Changed the World**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b0695062a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Free Beacon_
“There is no greater measure of presidential significance than a chief executive's ability to transform not just his own but also the opposing party. When it comes to the Middle East and China, the Democrats are closer to Donald Trump today than they were at the outset of his term,” American Enterprise Institute fellow Matthew Continetti writes.

📖 **MORE:**[**President Trump Proved the Middle East ‘Experts’ Wrong**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=220a44a72d&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.nationalreview.com/2020/09/how-trump-defied-the-experts-and-forged-a-breakthrough-in-the-middle-east/")
---
|
---
| [**Coronavirus Vaccine -- We'll Get One and Here's Why We Trust the Science**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86c772c51e&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
Operation Warp Speed, “which uses federal research dollars to supplement and accelerate private companies’ vaccine development efforts, could now be mere months away from having a COVID-19 vaccine approved and ready to save lives,” write Reps. Phil Roe, Brad Wenstrup, Andy Harris, and Larry Bucshon, who are all physicians.

**🎬 WATCH:** [When a vaccine is approved, it will be distributed within 24 hours](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a47e6b2be8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**The Higher Wages of Growth**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3101b64ae5&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Wall Street Journal_
“In case you missed it, and most of the media did, the Census Bureau reported Tuesday that the median household income in 2019 grew a whopping 6.8%—the largest annual increase on record . . . Lower-income workers and minorities benefited from faster growth and a tighter labor market before the pandemic,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| [**US Will Protect Citizens and Defend Sovereignty Against International Court**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67fa69c789&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Multilateral organizations must be held to high standards . . . The International Criminal Court, in its present form, is inherently susceptible to political bias, manipulation and corruption. It neither serves American interests, nor the interests of its member states that genuinely want justice for war criminals,” Secretary of State Mike Pompeo writes.
---
|
---
| [**Education Department Opens Investigation into Princeton University After President Deems Racism 'Embedded' in the School**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d339e63205&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Washington Examiner_
The U.S. Department of Education has opened an investigation into Princeton University after school president Christopher Eisgruber wrote an open letter alleging that racism persists at Princeton. “What the [Department of Education] seeks to obtain from its investigation is what evidence Princeton used in its determination that the university is racist, including all records regarding Eisgruber's letter,” Tiana Lowe reports.

**🎬**** WATCH: **[**No American should be made to feel ashamed of their history!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c211788ff3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The next phase of our fight to cancel student loan debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This week, Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer and I introduced a bold plan for how the president of the United States can use his executive authority to deliver meaningful relief to struggling Ame | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251aa/45c30650/1c043ec52/66e8f171/2620049919/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Here's an idea that would immediately put hundreds and thousands of dollars back in the pockets of millions of Americans, start to close the racial wealth gap, and boost our economy:

Canceling student loan debt.

And the president can get it done without waiting for Congress.

This week, Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer and I introduced a bold plan for how **the president of the United States can use his executive authority to deliver meaningful relief to struggling Americans and broadly cancel up to $50,000 in student loan debt.**

[Democrats will push for this action in 2021. But I need you to be a part of this effort -- because we can only get it done if we fight for it side by side as a grassroots movement. Add your name and join the fight to get this done.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251aa/45c30650/1c043ec52/66e8f170/2620049919/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYxNV9TR05fRURVX0VfMjAyMDA5MThfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans-oped?source=EMV15_SGN_EDU_E_20200918_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

We need to take action because families need relief. Over 40 million Americans are being crushed by over $1.5 trillion in federal student loan debt -- a massive burden that's preventing people from being able to start a small business or buy a home, and forcing students to drop out of school before completing their degree.

**In the middle of an economy that's been badly hit by the pandemic, the student debt crisis acts like an anchor, preventing a swift recovery and restricting opportunity and prosperity for millions of American families.**

**Canceling student loan debt as soon as possible would mean substantial and immediate relief for tens of millions of Americans,** many of whom have suddenly been laid off or are worried that their jobs are next.

Our country's growing student debt burden has Americans less prepared to weather this coronavirus recession, which has compounded decades of stagnant wages, labor market discrimination, and rising costs of living, making it nearly impossible for many to ever fully repay their student loans.

And communities of color, which have been hit hardest by the health and economic consequences of the coronavirus pandemic, disproportionately bear the burden of student debt.

Black students are on average nearly 20 percentage points more likely to take out federal student loans. Half of Black borrowers and a third of Latinx borrowers default on their loans within 20 years. **Canceling student loan debt would increase wealth for Black and Latinx families, help them avoid default, and start to close the racial wealth gap.**

**Economists agree that canceling student loan debt would also help boost our struggling economy** through a consumer-driven economic stimulus, greater home-buying rates and housing stability, expanded access to more affordable financial products including car loans and mortgages, higher college completion rates, and greater small business formation. This is a no brainer for our economy.

**Congress, through the Higher Education Act, has already given the president and his Secretary of Education the ability to modify, compromise, waive, or release student loans.** This authority provides a safety valve for federal student loan programs, letting the Secretary use her discretion to wipe away loans even when they do not meet the eligibility criteria for more specific cancellation programs like disability discharge. America needs that safety valve now more than ever.

Look: Chuck Schumer and I both saw what happened in 2008. After the financial crisis, young people were shoved into a weak job market and plunged even deeper into student debt. And today, as workers face layoffs and frozen wages in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic, student loan borrowers who were barely staying afloat are now drowning. **When Americans can't fully participate in our economy, we see a ripple effect across our entire economy and a slowdown in economic growth. This affects all of us,** including those of us who don't have student loans or have already paid off their student debt.

We can do better than this. And Democrats will.

[Join the fight alongside me and Chuck Schumer if you agree that the president should take executive action to broadly cancel student loan debt. ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251aa/45c30650/1c043ec52/66e8f170/2620049919/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYxNV9TR05fRURVX0VfMjAyMDA5MThfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-student-loans-oped?source=EMV15_SGN_EDU_E_20200918_V1S3_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: This week, Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer and I introduced a bold plan for how the president of the United States can use his executive authority to deliver meaningful relief to struggling Ame | | | "" Here's an idea that would immediately put hundreds and thousands of dollars back in the pockets of millions of Americans, start to close the racial wealth gap, and boost our economy: Canceling student loan debt. And the president can get it done without waiting for Congress. This week, Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer and I introduced a bold plan for how the president of the United States can use his executive authority to deliver meaningful relief to struggling Americans and broadly cancel up to $50,000 in student loan debt. "" We need to take action because families need relief. Over 40 million Americans are being crushed by over $1.5 trillion in federal student loan debt -- a massive burden that's preventing people from being able to start a small business or buy a home, and forcing students to drop out of school before completing their degree. In the middle of an economy that's been badly hit by the pandemic, the student debt crisis acts like an anchor, preventing a swift recovery and restricting opportunity and prosperity for millions of American families. Canceling student loan debt as soon as possible would mean substantial and immediate relief for tens of millions of Americans, many of whom have suddenly been laid off or are worried that their jobs are next. Our country's growing student debt burden has Americans less prepared to weather this coronavirus recession, which has compounded decades of stagnant wages, labor market discrimination, and rising costs of living, making it nearly impossible for many to ever fully repay their student loans. And communities of color, which have been hit hardest by the health and economic consequences of the coronavirus pandemic, disproportionately bear the burden of student debt. Black students are on average nearly 20 percentage points more likely to take out federal student loans. Half of Black borrowers and a third of Latinx borrowers default on their loans within 20 years. Canceling student loan debt would increase wealth for Black and Latinx families, help them avoid default, and start to close the racial wealth gap. Economists agree that canceling student loan debt would also help boost our struggling economy through a consumer-driven economic stimulus, greater home-buying rates and housing stability, expanded access to more affordable financial products including car loans and mortgages, higher college completion rates, and greater small business formation. This is a no brainer for our economy. Congress, through the Higher Education Act, has already given the president and his Secretary of Education the ability to modify, compromise, waive, or release student loans. This authority provides a safety valve for federal student loan programs, letting the Secretary use her discretion to wipe away loans even when they do not meet the eligibility criteria for more specific cancellation programs like disability discharge. America needs that safety valve now more than ever. Look: Chuck Schumer and I both saw what happened in 2008. After the financial crisis, young people were shoved into a weak job market and plunged even deeper into student debt. And today, as workers face layoffs and frozen wages in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic, student loan borrowers who were barely staying afloat are now drowning. When Americans can't fully participate in our economy, we see a ripple effect across our entire economy and a slowdown in economic growth. This affects all of us, including those of us who don't have student loans or have already paid off their student debt. We can do better than this. And Democrats will. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Mark Warner
subject: Just cast my ballot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I decided that I wanted to cast my vote early in person, but the great thing about voting this year in Virginia is that we have options.
|
---

| | Derek --

As you might know, early voting started today in Virginia. This morning, I went to the voter registration office in Alexandria and cast my ballot. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa3/53d9897e/55e44d36/1c88107b/3845798170/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200918_f_2_nd__797__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
I decided that I wanted to cast my vote early in person, but the great thing about voting this year in Virginia is that we have options.

Thanks to our General Assembly, this year Virginia voters can:
* Cast their ballot early in person
* Use a no-excuse absentee ballot to vote by mail
* Or vote in-person on Election Day on November 3rd

The first step is making sure that you're registered to vote. You can check your voter registration status and review your options to cast your ballot at **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa3/53d9897e/55e44d36/1c88107a/3845798170/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")**.

No matter how you're planning to vote this year -- whether you're voting early in person, like I did, or whether you're voting by mail or in person on Election Day -- it's so important that you vote.

This election is about who we are -- and who we want to be -- as a country. I hope you'll make your voice heard in this election.

Thank you,
---
-- Mark Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa3/53d9897e/55e44d36/1c881079/3845798170/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200918_f_2_nd__797__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa3/53d9897e/55e44d36/1c881078/3845798170/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

Sen. Cornyn has taken **_more than $90 thousand_** from private detention company PACs and executives, and he hasn't spoken up AT ALL about this. We need a leader who will protect the human rights of immigrants and asylum seekers -- not a corporate bootlicker who will turn a blind eye to horrifying abuses like these.

**[Sign our petition to demand Sen. Cornyn stop taking money from private detention companies.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f5b/7f51f7bc/453e1913/4efa0f6f/1116903632/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-detentioncenters")**

He needs to be an impartial representative of the PEOPLE of Texas, not special interests.

\-- Team MJ
